Ideal for business travellers, contractors, couples, and extended stays, this modern apartment offers elegant interiors, fast WiFi, Netflix entertainment, free parking, and a fully equipped kitchen for a comfortable home-away-from-home experience.

The space
This spacious ground-floor apartment comfortably accommodates up to 3 guests and features a king-size bedroom, sofa bed, modern bathroom, bright living area, and fully equipped kitchen. Designed for comfort and convenience, the property is ideal for both short and long-term stays.

✔ Netflix TV & Fast WiFi

Thoughtfully furnished with stylish décor and equipped with modern amenities throughout, it offers everything needed for a comfortable and convenient stay for up to 2 guests. title: One mile from Drayton Manor
description:
Comfy 2 bedroom home on a quiet cul de sac in Fazeley, Tamworth. Very close to Drayton Manor (1 mile) and other attractions including the SnowDome, Ventura retail park, Castle adventure golf and Namco funscape.

The house can sleep up to 3 guests, with one double and one single bed.

During your stay you will have access to the entire house, which includes a fully equipped kitchen and lounge with flat-screen TV.

Self-check in is via a Keysafe.

The space
Ideal for small families, single travellers, business trips, and couples.

Fazeley village offers a variety of restaurants (Indian, Cantonese, Fish and Chips), a Tesco Express, Post Office, Pharmacy, and local pubs which are all within a short walk away. Ventura Retail park which is located less than 1 mile away has a wide range of shops including; Sainsbury's, Asda superstore, Next, M&S and many more.

The house is very close to Drayton Manor Theme Park/Thomas Land (1 mile), The Snowdome (1 mile), Ventura shopping park and The Belfry Golf Resort & Spa (5 miles). 10 mins from J10, M42.

The house is also within 300 yards of the Coventry Canal offering some lovely walking options.

Guest access
You will have access to the whole house and garden.

There is a table and chairs in the garden to enjoy those summer days/evenings.

Other things to note
Nearest train stations: Wilnecote 1 mile, Tamworth 1.5 miles

Strictly no smoking or pets.

Please note, we do have a Ring Doorbell set up on the front of the property. This is set to record motion only, and is purely for security purposes.

• Modern top-floor Arcadian suite

• Free secure parking (1 space)

title: Floor-to-ceiling skyline views from the Rotunda
description:
Central, chic and iconic - the perfect Birmingham getaway! The Rotunda: next door neighbours to The Bullring, the location couldn't be more perfect! A perfect blend of luxury & home comforts in the World-Famous Rotunda building. With floor to ceiling windows overlooking Birmingham's city skyline, is the essential base for exploring all Birmingham has to offer. The sunset views are must-see! The beautiful design makes this apartment unique, and the vibrancy matches the surrounding city.

The space
Book now for European Athletics Championship 2026

💰Looking for discounts? Please follow the instructions on the green picture for more information

📍 New Street ( Grand Central ) 5 minutes walk
Moor Street Station 4 minute walk

🏠Airbnb are proud to present this simply stunning,2 bedroom 2 bathroom apartment, sleeps 6 in The famous Rotunda. Ideal for travelling professionals and families who desire a home away from home feel with a touch of uniqueness to their getaway!

🔐KeyNest self check in for your convenience.

🛏️The large bedrooms with floor to ceiling windows overlooking the vast Birmingham skyline, boasts a luxury king sized bed made up with crisp linen and clothes storage. Attached to the en-suite with a beautiful power shower over the deep bath calls for relaxation with a spa like experience.

📺The open plan living room caters for all TV entertainment fans where guests can enjoy Netflix, Prime TV plus many more streaming services. The large sofa bed folds for an extra two guests.

👨‍🍳The kitchen, with fridge freezer, electric hob and oven is complete with everything you’ll need to cook your favourite meals to enjoy around the kitchen island or dining table overlooking the city.

Guest access
🔑 Guest Access & Welcome
Guests will have full private access to the entire property for the duration of their stay, ensuring complete comfort and privacy throughout your visit.

📦 Easy Self Check-In
Access is via a secure lockbox, allowing for simple and convenient self check-in at a time that suits you—no waiting around, just arrive and relax.

🏡 Sophie's Homes Welcome
At Sophie's Homes, we love welcoming guests and want you to feel right at home from the moment you arrive. We’re always happy to help if you need anything during your stay and are committed to making your visit comfortable, smooth, and memorable. ✨

Guests are welcome to request early check-in or late check-out for a small additional fee 😊
We’ll always do our best to accommodate, but this does depend on our cleaners’ schedule and availability.

Once you’ve booked, simply send your request through your Sophie’s Homes portal link.

If we’re unable to arrange it, standard check-in is from 3:00 PM and check-out is by 10:00 AM. Please note that late check-out without prior approval may incur additional fees.

Thanks so much for your understanding—we’ll always try to make your stay as comfortable as possible!

Other things to note
✨ What to Expect on Arrival ✨

To help you settle in comfortably and enjoy a relaxing first night, we’ve prepared a complimentary starter pack for your stay, including:

🧻 2 toilet rolls
🫧 Washing-up liquid
🧽 Dish sponge
🧺 Cleaning cloth
🍽️ 2 dishwasher tablets (if Property has dishwasher)
👕 2 laundry tablets
☕ Tea & coffee-making facilities ready for your arrival

We hope these little touches help you feel at home from the moment you arrive. 💛

✨ Early Check-In & Late Check-Out ✨

Once you’ve booked with us, you’re welcome to request an early check-in or late check-out. These are subject to our cleaner’s schedule on the day, but we will always do everything we can to accommodate your request. 💛

🌐 To access check-in details, we will share a secure portal link after booking, which we are excited to share with you.

✨ The portal will also include recommendations for local attractions and guides to the property amenities.

❓ Please let us know if you have any questions about this.

*Parking

We strongly advise before travelling to look for appropriate parking. There are many places to park within a short walk of the property at varying prices. Website such as JustPark and YourParkingSpace can help in your search.

Closest parking is: Edgbaston Street car park, Selfridges and Moor Street car park and NCP Birmingham High Street


Train stations

The closest train stations are
New Street ( Grand Central ) 5 minutes walk
Moor Street Station 4 minute walk

Be mindful when travelling with small children that the windows open fully and the barrier is adult waist height.

title: Modern minimalist in a historic building
description:
This unique apartment is in a historic Grade II listed building in Birmingham's Jewellery Quarter. It has modern minimalist décor but remains cosy and full of character.

The space
THE APARTMENT LAYOUT & STYLING MAY DIFFER SLIGHTLY FROM THE PHOTOS

This beautiful apartment has been finished to a high standard and features comfortable furnishings, modern fixtures, and fittings.

The open plan living area comprises a modern, fully equipped kitchen with all the essential cooking amenities, including a Nescafe Dolce Gusto coffee machine. In addition, it comes with a fridge-freezer, microwave, hob cooker, oven, integrated dishwasher and a washer-dryer machine.

The bedroom features storage space and a comfy bed of white cotton linen.

The modern bathroom features towels, shaving sockets and complimentary toiletries.

The lounge and master bedroom are equipped with Smart TVs supporting all your favourite streaming services and our high-speed WIFI to keep you.

Other things to note
Age restriction - Lead guest minimum age 21

A DAMAGE SECURITY DEPOSIT of £200 is required per Apartment.

Before arrival, all guests must provide a photo ID (e.g., driving license or passport).

If you don’t provide identification, the booking will be cancelled. Please don’t hesitate to contact us if you have any questions regarding identification and accessing the property.

Your comfort, health and safety are our top concerns. This property has a contactless check-in. Security cameras on entrances and walkways. Plus, we are working with our cleaners to implement COVID-19 infection prevention and sanitation measures.


House rules

Please read all the rules before confirming your booking.

Check-in: After 3:00 PM - 8:30 PM
Checkout: 11:00 AM

• Early check-in and Late checkout request fee of £30, depending on
availability. No Early check-in or late checkout on weekends!

. All guests checking must provide ID.

. Damage Security Deposit £200

• No parties or events

• No excessively loud music or noise during your stay

• Not suitable for children and infants

. Suitable for children 13+

• No pets

• No smoking in the apartments or courtyard

. Quiet hours are between 23:00 - 00:07

. No shoes on carpet or rugs

• If the Apartment is left excessively dirty or requires more than a
standard clean, an additional £60 will be charged.

• Damage or soiled linen or Rugs will be charged accordingly.

• Any damage to the Apartment or items within the Apartment will be
deducted from the security deposit. Likewise, any missing items from
the Apartment will be deducted from the security deposit. The lead
guest will be held liable for any additional costs if the damage caused or
missing items exceeds the security deposit value,

• Smoking inside the building or courtyard will result in all guests’ eviction
and no refund for the day or security deposit.

• Exceeding the specified number of guests per Apartment is not allowed
and will result in all guests’ eviction and no refund for the day or security
deposit.

• Violation of the house rules or disturbing other guests will result in all
guest’s eviction and no refund for the day or security deposit

title: Skylights and bifold doors to garden
description:
Spacious high spec 6 bedroom home sleeping up to 12 guests, perfectly located near the NEC, Birmingham Airport, JLR and Solihull.

Designed for comfort & socialising, the property features a stylish open plan kitchen and living area with skylights, a large island and bifold doors opening onto a private garden.

Ideal for families, professionals, contractors and group stays looking for a modern & comfortable base with excellent transport links.

Perfect for business trips, events & family stays.

The space
Spacious high spec 6 bedroom home sleeping up to 12 guests, ideal for groups, contractors and stays near the NEC, Birmingham Airport, JLR and Solihull.

This well designed home gives you space to relax, work and stay comfortably as a group without feeling on top of each other. The layout works particularly well for mixed groups, with a combination of room types that allows everyone to enjoy their own space while still making the most of the shared living areas.

The open plan kitchen and living area is the heart of the home, filled with natural light from skylights and bifold doors opening onto a private garden. It’s a great space to cook, socialise or unwind after a busy day, with a large kitchen island and plenty of seating throughout.

Each bedroom has been designed with comfort in mind, with a mix of king, double and twin rooms, including a ground floor bedroom with en suite. This gives flexibility whether you’re travelling with colleagues, friends or family.

Fast WiFi and off street parking are included. Professionally managed to make your stay smooth and straightforward from check in to check out.

Guest access
You will have access to the whole house. It will be occupied by your and your guest only.

Other things to note
Understanding and complying with our house rules will make for a comfortable and fun stay for everybody! Please read each of the rules carefully in order to avoid any danger or deductions from your security deposit upon-checkout.

Please treat our house with the same respect as you would your own home. We’ve put a lot of effort into making this into a lovely space to be enjoyed by our guests.

Be sure to maintain a good level of cleanliness throughout your stay, this will make it much easier when check-out time comes!

In case of any accidental damage, we’ll look into the issue to decide if and how much the deduction or repair cost will be.

Lost keys will be charged at £100 to replace them so please take care of them.

If any gas canisters are left in the property there will be a charge of £100 to dispose of them correctly.

Please respect our quiet times between the hours of 22:00 - 07:00 hrs. We have great neighbours and do not want to annoy them.

Strictly no smoking is allowed inside the property, if evidence of smoking is found there will be a charge of £100. Feel free to smoke outside however please be responsible and dispose of the cigarette butts in the bin.

Strictly no parties allowed, if our neighbours complain you will be asked to leave with no refund.

title: Historic Coleshill center with private garden
description:
✨🏡 Welcome to our beautiful townhouse in the centre of historic Coleshill, a comfortable and stylish home with local shops, cafés, and amenities just a short walk away.
🛋 Relax in the spacious living room, perfect for watching TV 📺 or unwinding after a day exploring the area. Enjoy meals together 🍽 around the large dining table, after cooking in the fully equipped kitchen 👨‍🍳.
🛏 The bedrooms offer a luxurious and cosy feel:
The townhouse can comfortably sleep up to 6

The space
💰 Follow the instructions on the green picture to unlock exclusive discounts for your stay!

⭐ Why Guests Love Staying Here

🏡 Enjoy a comfortable and spacious entire house in Birmingham, perfect for families, groups of friends, business travellers, or contractors looking for a relaxing home-from-home.

✨ This welcoming property combines comfort, convenience, and great amenities, making it ideal for both short stays and longer visits.

Guests love this home because it offers:

📍 Convenient Birmingham location with easy access to shops, restaurants, and transport links
🛋 Spacious living areas perfect for relaxing or spending time together
📶 Fast & reliable WiFi for streaming, browsing, or remote working
📺 Smart TV for entertainment after a busy day
🚗 Private parking space included for convenience
🔑 Easy self check-in, allowing flexible arrival times
🐾 Pet-friendly accommodation, so your furry companions can join the trip

Whether you're visiting Birmingham for leisure, work, or family trips, this house offers a comfortable and practical place to stay.

🏠 Property Overview

📍 Location: Birmingham
🏠 Property Type: Entire house – enjoy full private access during your stay

👥 Sleeps: Up to 6 guests comfortably

This makes the property ideal for:

👨‍👩‍👧 Families
👫 Groups of friends
💼 Business travellers
👷 Contractors staying for work

🛏 Bedrooms

The home features three comfortable bedrooms, designed to ensure a relaxing and restful stay.

🛏 Bedroom 1 (Master Bedroom)
👑 Comfortable king-size bed with soft bedding for a great night's sleep.

🛏 Bedroom 2
🛌 Two single beds, perfect for friends, colleagues, or children.

🛏 Bedroom 3
🛏 Bunk bed, ideal for children or additional guests.

All bedrooms provide a cosy and welcoming environment to help you relax after a busy day.

🛋 Living Area

The comfortable lounge area is perfect for relaxing and spending time together.

Enjoy:

🛋 Comfortable seating
📺 Smart TV for streaming movies and shows
Plenty of space for guests to socialise and unwind

It’s the perfect place to relax after exploring Birmingham or finishing a day of work.

🍳 Kitchen & Dining

The home includes a fully equipped kitchen, allowing guests to cook meals just like at home.

Kitchen features include:

🍳 Oven & hob
🍽 Cookware and cooking utensils
🥣 Crockery and cutlery
☕ Kettle and toaster
🧊 Fridge/freezer

Perfect for preparing breakfast, quick meals, or family dinners during your stay.

💻 Work & Connectivity

For business travellers or remote workers, the property offers:

📶 Fast & free WiFi throughout the house
💼 Dedicated workspace with desk area
💻 Comfortable environment for working remotely or attending virtual meetings

🚿 Bathroom

🛁 The property includes one clean and well-maintained bathroom.

Guests can enjoy:

🚿 Shower/bath facilities
🧴 Fresh towels provided
✨ Clean and comfortable space to start or end your day

🚗 Parking & Check-In

🚗 1 parking space available for guest use.

🔑 Self check-in available, making arrival simple and flexible.

You can check in at your convenience without needing to meet the host in person.

📜 House Rules

To ensure all guests enjoy their stay, please note:

🚭 Smoking is not permitted inside the property
🎉 Parties or events are not allowed
🐾 Pets are welcome – well-behaved furry companions can stay too

✨ We look forward to welcoming you for a comfortable and enjoyable stay in Birmingham.

Guest access
Guest Access & Welcome
Guests will have full private access to the entire property for the duration of their stay, ensuring complete comfort and privacy throughout your visit.

📦 Easy Self Check-In
Access is via a secure lockbox, allowing for simple and convenient self check-in at a time that suits you—no waiting around, just arrive and relax.

🏡 Sophie's Homes Welcome
At Sophie's Homes, we love welcoming guests and want you to feel right at home from the moment you arrive. We’re always happy to help if you need anything during your stay and are committed to making your visit comfortable, smooth, and memorable. ✨

Guests are welcome to request early check-in or late check-out for a small additional fee 😊
We’ll always do our best to accommodate, but this does depend on our cleaners’ schedule and availability.

Once you’ve booked, simply send your request through your Sophie’s Homes portal link.

If we’re unable to arrange it, standard check-in is from 3:00 PM and check-out is by 10:00 AM. Please note that late check-out without prior approval may incur additional fees.

Thanks so much for your understanding—we’ll always try to make your stay as comfortable as possible!

Other things to note
✨ What to Expect on Arrival ✨

To help you settle in comfortably and enjoy a relaxing first night, we’ve prepared a complimentary starter pack for your stay, including:

🧻 2 toilet rolls
🫧 Washing-up liquid
🧽 Dish sponge
🧺 Cleaning cloth
🍽️ 2 dishwasher tablets
👕 2 laundry tablets
☕ Tea & coffee-making facilities ready for your arrival

We hope these little touches help you feel at home from the moment you arrive. 💛

✨ Early Check-In & Late Check-Out ✨

Once you’ve booked with us, you’re welcome to request an early check-in or late check-out. These are subject to our cleaner’s schedule on the day, but we will always do everything we can to accommodate your request. 💛

🌐 To access check-in details, we will share a secure portal link after booking, which we are excited to share with you.

✨ The portal will also include recommendations for local attractions and guides to the property amenities.

❓ Please let us know if you have any questions about this.

title: Spacious 4BR Home |Sleeps 9 |Free Parking & Garden
description:
Welcome to our spacious four-bedroom home in the heart of Walsall Wood, thoughtfully designed to make families, friends and professionals feel at home.

Whether you’re visiting loved ones, working locally, relocating or simply exploring the West Midlands, you’ll enjoy stylish interiors, generous living space and everything you need for a relaxing stay.

The space
Sleeping up to 9 guests, the property offers two comfortable lounges, a beautiful designer kitchen with a large island, three modern bathrooms, fast Wi-Fi, free private parking and a private garden with BBQ, making it ideal for both short breaks and longer stays.

Our home has been carefully prepared before every arrival to ensure a clean, comfortable and welcoming stay.

Designed with comfort and convenience in mind, you’ll have exclusive access to the entire property.

Living Areas

Relax together in two comfortable lounges, perfect for family evenings, catching up with friends or unwinding after work. The open-plan layout creates a welcoming space for everyone to enjoy.

Kitchen & Dining

The spacious designer kitchen is fully equipped with everything you need to prepare meals during your stay.

Features include:

• Large kitchen island

• American-style fridge freezer

• Modern appliances

• Dining space for shared meals

• Integrated ceiling speakers

Whether you’re preparing breakfast before work or hosting a family dinner, the kitchen is designed to bring everyone together.

Bedrooms

Our home comfortably sleeps up to 9 guests, making it perfect for larger families, groups and business travellers.

Each bedroom has been thoughtfully furnished with comfortable beds, quality linen and ample storage to help you settle in.

Bathrooms

With three bathrooms, there’s plenty of space for everyone to get ready comfortably.

⸻

Outdoor Space

Step outside into your own private garden.

Enjoy outdoor dining, relax with a morning coffee or make the most of the BBQ during warmer months.

The enclosed garden provides a peaceful place to unwind after a busy day.

⸻

Perfect for

✔ Families

✔ Contractors

✔ Business travellers

✔ NHS staff

✔ Relocation stays

✔ Insurance accommodation

✔ Wedding guests

✔ Friends and group trips

✔ Longer stays

⸻

What’s Included

* Entire home
* Sleeps up to 9 guests
* Free driveway parking
* Fast, reliable Wi-Fi
* Two lounges
* Designer kitchen
* Large kitchen island
* American fridge freezer
* Three bathrooms
* Hotel-quality bed linen
* Fresh towels
* Washing machine
* Private garden
* BBQ (available on request)
* Family-friendly property

⸻

Location

Located in the peaceful village of Walsall Wood, the property offers easy access to Birmingham, Walsall, Lichfield, Cannock and Sutton Coldfield.

Whether you’re travelling for work, visiting family or exploring the Midlands, you’ll be well positioned with shops, supermarkets, restaurants and transport links all within easy reach.

⸻

Longer Stays Welcome

The property is fully equipped for extended stays, making it an excellent choice for professionals on temporary assignments, families relocating or anyone looking for a comfortable home away from home.

Weekly and monthly discounts are automatically applied where available.

⸻

Guest Access

Guests have exclusive use of the entire property, including the private garden and driveway.

⸻

Why Guests Choose Our Home

✓ Spacious enough for larger groups without feeling crowded

✓ Professionally cleaned before every stay

✓ Comfortable beds and quality linen

✓ Fast Wi-Fi for work and streaming

✓ Three bathrooms for added convenience

✓ Quiet residential location

✓ Free parking

✓ A true home away from home

title: Hotel-like setup near the city center
description:
Tudors Two Bedroom Apartment is located close to city centre, set up with hotel-like amenities such as fresh linen, towels, toiletries, a fully equipped kitchen with a toaster, fridge/freezer, kettle and cooking items. We also provide NETFLIX, a Smart TV and high-speed Wi-Fi. All bills are included.


The price shown is based on 6 guests. This accommodation can accommodate 7 guests maximum (1 x extra sofa bed). Please note that extra charges will apply. Prepayment required.

The space
We care about comfort at Tudors, which is why we've put 4K SMART TV's in every apartment with Netflix, YouTube and more. It's part of the Tudor's experience! For the duration of your stay, you'll have FREE WIFI, towels and toiletries.

The kitchen will be equipped with plates, dishes, cups and cooking tools too.

You will have full access to the property.

You're our guest and that makes you our greatest priority. We take great pride in the spaces we accommodate our guests in. Ensuring they're clean, stylish and well equipped with everything you'd need during your stay with us.

Please note photos are a mix of the different units within the building, If you have any special requests, please contact us directly (subject to availability)

✔ A 4K HD SMART TV
✔ FREE WIFI
✔ FREE TOWELS
✔ FREE TOILETRIES
✔ PROFESSIONAL HOTEL LINEN
✔ SECURE BUILDING
✔ TEA, COFFEE AND EXTRAS
✔ NETFLIX, BBC IPLAYER, ITV AND YOUTUBE
✔ CUSTOMER SERVICE TEAM
✔ GREAT LOCATION

Guest access
Guests will access the entire apartment: this includes kitchen, living room, bedrooms and any additional spaces.

Other things to note
EXTRA INFORMATION WORTH KNOWING:

Free on street parking (first come first serve basis)

We DO NOT condone parties or events.

Kindly note that quiet hours are between 22:00 - 08:00.

One off delivery fee : £25
Linen set (single or double) : £10
Sofa bed or fold-out bed : £15 per night, per bed.
Pet Fee: £15 per night, per pet. (Discounts available for longer stay)
Early check-in: £20 per hour before 4 pm
Late check-out (planned): £20 per hour after 10 am
Late check-out (unplanned): £40 per hour after 10 am

All additional services are subject to availability and prepayment required.

SELF CHECK IN: For the benefit of our guests we operate on a self check in process

CHECK IN: Your contactless check in instructions will be issued from 3:45pm on the day of your arrival and you will be able to check in anytime after 4 pm.

CUT OFF TIME: We operate on emergencies only after 6 pm and communication might be limited.

COMMUNICATION: Our phone lines are extremely busy most of the time and we do not guarantee your phone call will be answered or that you will receive a call back. However, written communication is answered on a timely manner and we ask all our guests to contact us by emails or messages only to ensure a quick reply.

POST: We would like to kindly request that you do not send any deliveries/posts to the address of stay We are not liable for collection or delivery of any posts.

EARLY CHECK IN/EXTENSIONS: We allow paid early check ins where possible and we also offer discounts on booking extensions. Please get in touch with us by replying to this message if you wish to extend your stay or for an early check in.

Property Disclaimer
Please note that the property is located in a central area. As such, guests may experience noise from outside the premises at various times throughout the day and night, including traffic, pedestrians, neighbouring properties, and general city activity.

Guest Information Requirement
Please note that, prior to check-in, guests will be required to provide the following information:

Email address
Phone number
Estimated time of arrival (ETA)


This information is required to facilitate a smooth check-in process and ensure effective communication during your stay. All communications will be primarily conducted through Airbnb.

At present, Birmingham City Council is experiencing ongoing bin collection strikes. This may result in rubbish being present outside the premises and/or within surrounding communal areas. These circumstances are outside of our control.

title: #180 Urban Skyline Retreat Birmingham - Sleeps 4
description:
Experience elevated city living in this elegant 7th-floor apartment in Birmingham's Jewellery Quarter. Enjoy stylish interiors, skyline views, a fully equipped kitchen, Smart TV, super-fast WiFi, and hotel-quality comforts. Perfect for couples, families, and business travellers. Just a short walk from St Paul's Square, Colmore Row, Bullring, Selfridges, Birmingham New Street Station, and the city's best restaurants, cafés, and attractions.

The space
⭐ Why Guests Love Staying Here
📍 Prime Birmingham City Centre Location

Located in Birmingham B3 1FG, this stylish apartment places you within easy walking distance of the Jewellery Quarter, St Paul's Square, Colmore Row, Bullring & Grand Central, Birmingham New Street Station, along with an excellent selection of restaurants, cafés, bars, and entertainment venues. Whether you're visiting for business, shopping, sightseeing, or a city break, you'll be perfectly positioned to experience the very best of Birmingham.

🏠 Entire Private Apartment

Enjoy exclusive access to the entire apartment throughout your stay. Thoughtfully designed with comfort and convenience in mind, this modern apartment offers a welcoming home away from home for families, couples, friends, contractors, and business travellers.

🛏 Comfortable Sleeping Arrangements (2 Bedrooms)

Designed to provide a restful night's sleep, the apartment features:

2 Comfortable Double Beds
Hotel-quality bed linen
Fresh towels
Comfortable mattresses
Wardrobes and storage space

Everything has been carefully prepared to ensure a relaxing and comfortable stay.

👥 Sleeps Up to 4 Guests

Perfect for families, couples, friends, contractors, and business travellers looking for stylish accommodation in the heart of Birmingham.

🛁 Two Modern Bathrooms

The apartment offers two contemporary bathrooms, providing added convenience for families and groups. Fresh towels, complimentary toiletries, and essential amenities are provided for every guest.

🛋 Bright & Spacious Living Area

Unwind in the open-plan living area with comfortable seating, a Smart TV, and plenty of natural light. It's the perfect place to relax after a day exploring the city, shopping, or attending meetings.

🍳 Fully Equipped Kitchen

Cook with ease in the modern kitchen, complete with cookware, crockery, cutlery, utensils, and essential appliances. Whether you're preparing breakfast before heading out or enjoying a home-cooked dinner, you'll have everything you need.

☕ Dining Area

The dining table is ideal for enjoying meals together and also provides a practical workspace for remote working, studying, or planning your day.

📶 Fast & Free WiFi

Stay connected with reliable high-speed WiFi throughout the apartment, perfect for streaming, video calls, remote working, and everyday browsing.

📺 Smart TV

Log in to your favourite streaming services and enjoy films, TV shows, and entertainment from the comfort of the living area.

💼 Dedicated Workspace

A dedicated desk and comfortable chair provide the ideal setup for business travellers, students, or anyone working remotely.

🚗 Parking Information

On-street parking is available nearby and is free from 6:00 PM until the following morning, subject to local restrictions. A secure paid car park is also located just a short walk away. Guests staying 30 nights or longer will receive complimentary parking at the nearby car park for the duration of their stay.

🔑 Easy Self Check-in

Enjoy a smooth and flexible arrival with secure self check-in. Full access instructions will be provided before your arrival for a hassle-free check-in experience.

🚭 Smoke-Free Property

Smoking and vaping are strictly prohibited inside the apartment to maintain a clean, fresh, and welcoming environment for every guest.

🎉 No Parties or Events

To respect our neighbours and maintain a peaceful atmosphere, parties, events, excessive noise, and unauthorised gatherings are not permitted.

✨ Whether you're visiting Birmingham for business, a city break, shopping, or sightseeing, this modern apartment offers the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and an unbeatable city-centre location.

Guest access
Guests will have full private access to the entire property for the duration of their stay, ensuring complete comfort and privacy throughout your visit.

📦 Easy Self Check-In
Access is via a keynest (you need to collect it to the address that will be given to you on the check in instruction), allowing for simple and convenient self check-in at a time that suits you

🏡 Sophie's Homes Welcome
At Sophie's Homes, we love welcoming guests and want you to feel right at home from the moment you arrive. We’re always happy to help if you need anything during your stay and are committed to making your visit comfortable, smooth, and memorable. ✨

Guests are welcome to request early check-in or late check-out for a small additional fee 😊
We’ll always do our best to accommodate, but this does depend on our cleaners’ schedule and availability.

Once you’ve booked, simply send your request through your Sophie’s Homes portal link.

If we’re unable to arrange it, standard check-in is from 3:00 PM and check-out is by 10:00 AM. Please note that late check-out without prior approval may incur additional fees.

Thanks so much for your understanding—we’ll always try to make your stay as comfortable as possible!

Other things to note
To help you settle in comfortably and enjoy a relaxing first night, we’ve prepared a complimentary starter pack for your stay, including:

🧻 2 toilet rolls
🫧 Washing-up liquid
🧽 Dish sponge
🧺 Cleaning cloth
🍽️ 2 dishwasher tablets (if Property has dishwasher)
👕 2 laundry tablets
☕ Tea & coffee-making facilities ready for your arrival

We hope these little touches help you feel at home from the moment you arrive. 💛

✨ Early Check-In & Late Check-Out ✨

Once you’ve booked with us, you’re welcome to request an early check-in or late check-out. These are subject to our cleaner’s schedule on the day, but we will always do everything we can to accommodate your request. 💛

🌐 To access check-in details, we will share a secure portal link after booking, which we are excited to share with you.

✨ The portal will also include recommendations for local attractions and guides to the property amenities.

❓ Please let us know if you have any questions about this.

description:
Welcome to this stylish 10-bedroom Birmingham retreat, perfect for large groups, contractors, corporate stays, and family gatherings.
Comfortably sleeping 16+ guests, with the option to extend to 15 bedrooms upon request, this spacious home combines modern interiors with practical comfort. Ideally located near NEC Birmingham, Birmingham Airport, HS2 sites, and JLR, it offers the perfect base for both business and leisure stays.

The space
Enter this expansive living spaces designed to bring people together while still offering privacy and comfort throughout the home. With stylish interiors, modern furnishings, and thoughtfully designed bedrooms, this property creates a relaxed yet refined atmosphere ideal for business travellers and group getaways alike.

The fully equipped kitchen makes group dining effortless, while multiple bathrooms provide added convenience for larger parties. After a busy day, unwind in the comfortable lounge areas, enjoy the private outdoor space, or relax with your favourite shows on the Smart TV.

Key Features:
• Spacious 10-bedroom home sleeping 16+ guests
• Option to extend to 15 bedrooms upon request
• Multiple private bathrooms for added convenience
• Stylish living areas with Smart TV
• Fully equipped kitchen perfect for group stays
• High-speed Wi-Fi throughout
• Washer, fresh linens, towels, and toiletries provided
• Private outdoor garden space
• Free on-site parking for multiple vehicles
• Ideal for contractors, corporate teams, and large families

Conveniently positioned close to NEC Birmingham, HS2 project sites, Birmingham Airport, Resorts World, and major motorway links, this home provides a premium base for business trips, events, and large group stays.

Guest access
Guests at Emirates House can enjoy a seamless self-check-in process, ensuring both convenience and safety throughout their stay.

The property is secured within private gates, granting access to only five exclusive residences—one of which is Emirates House. Nestled in Solihull, one of Birmingham’s most prestigious areas, this prime location offers a perfect blend of luxury, exclusivity, and security for a truly exceptional stay.

Other things to note
House Rules & Guest Expectations
To ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay for all guests, we kindly ask that you follow these house rules:

🚫 No Parties or Gatherings – This property is for registered guests only. Unauthorized events are strictly prohibited.

🚭 No Smoking or Vaping Indoors – Smoking and vaping are strictly prohibited inside the property. Please use the designated smoking area if needed.

🐾 Pets Allowed Upon Approval – There will be £50 per pet, and we will require a damage deposit of £100 (less than 20lbs). Note, that only dogs are allowed.

🔇 Respect Quiet Hours – Please keep noise levels to a minimum, especially during nighttime hours, to ensure a peaceful environment for everyone.

🏡 Respect the Property – Treat the home with care and report any damages or maintenance issues to the host immediately.

🚫 No Illegal Substances – The use of any illegal substances is strictly forbidden on the property.

👥 Guests & Visitors – Only registered guests are allowed on the property. Visitors are not permitted unless approved by the host in advance.

🧹 Maintain Cleanliness – Please keep the property clean and tidy during your stay. Excessive cleaning required after check-out may result in additional fees.

🤝 To help maintain our property in great condition, a security deposit of £500 is collected prior to check-in. This deposit is fully refundable after your stay if no damage or extra cleaning is needed.

We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to hosting you!

title: #179 Chic Birmingham City Escape - Sleeps 4
description:
Experience modern city living in this stylish apartment in Birmingham's vibrant Jewellery Quarter. Enjoy a bright open-plan space, fully equipped kitchen, fast WiFi, Smart TV, and everything you need for a relaxing stay. Just a short walk from St Paul's Square, Colmore Row, Birmingham New Street, Bullring, and the city's best restaurants, cafés, and attractions. Perfect for couples, families, business travellers, and long stays.

The space
⭐ Why Guests Love Staying Here
📍 Prime Birmingham City Centre Location

Located in the heart of Birmingham B3 1FG, this apartment places you within easy walking distance of the Jewellery Quarter, St Paul's Square, Colmore Row, Bullring Shopping Centre, Birmingham New Street Station, restaurants, cafés, bars, and many of the city's top attractions. Whether you're visiting for business or leisure, you'll be perfectly positioned to explore Birmingham.

🏠 Entire Private Apartment

Enjoy exclusive access to the entire apartment during your stay. Situated on the 3rd floor, this stylish and modern apartment offers complete privacy and all the comforts of home, making it ideal for both short city breaks and longer stays.

🛏 2 Comfortable Bedrooms

Designed to help you relax after a busy day, the apartment features:

2 Double Beds
Hotel-quality bed linen and fresh towels
Comfortable mattresses
Wardrobes and storage space for your belongings

Everything has been thoughtfully prepared to ensure a restful and comfortable night's sleep.

👥 Sleeps Up to 4 Guests

Perfect for families, couples, friends, contractors, and business travellers looking for spacious, modern accommodation in Birmingham city centre.

🛁 2 Modern Bathrooms

With two contemporary bathrooms, there's plenty of space for everyone to get ready comfortably. Fresh towels, complimentary toiletries, and essential amenities are provided for your convenience.

🛋 Bright & Spacious Living Area

The open-plan living area is the perfect place to unwind, featuring comfortable seating, a Smart TV, and plenty of natural light. Whether you're relaxing after sightseeing or enjoying a quiet evening in, you'll feel right at home.

🍳 Fully Equipped Kitchen

Prepare anything from a quick breakfast to a full evening meal in the modern kitchen, complete with cookware, crockery, cutlery, utensils, and essential appliances.

☕ Dining Area

Enjoy meals together around the dining table, which also provides a comfortable space for remote working, studying, or planning your day.

📶 Fast & Free WiFi

Stay connected with reliable high-speed WiFi throughout the apartment—perfect for streaming, video calls, remote work, and everyday browsing.

📺 Smart TV

Log in to your favourite streaming services and enjoy films, TV shows, and entertainment from the comfort of the living room.

💼 Dedicated Workspace

A practical workspace is available for guests who need to work remotely, attend virtual meetings, or study during their stay.

🚗 Parking Information

On-street parking is available nearby and is free from 6:00 PM until the following morning (subject to local restrictions). Secure paid parking is also located just around the corner. For guests staying 30 nights or longer, we will cover the cost of the nearby parking.

🔑 Easy Self Check-in

Enjoy the flexibility of self check-in with secure access. Detailed arrival instructions will be sent before your check-in date, allowing you to arrive at a time that suits you.

🚭 No Smoking or Vaping

Smoking and vaping are strictly prohibited anywhere inside the apartment to maintain a clean, fresh, and comfortable environment for all guests.

🎉 No Parties or Events

To respect our neighbours and maintain a peaceful atmosphere, parties, events, excessive noise, and unauthorised gatherings are not permitted.

Guest access
Guests will have full private access to the entire property for the duration of their stay, ensuring complete comfort and privacy throughout your visit.

📦 Easy Self Check-In
Access is via a keynest (you need to collect it to the address that will be given to you on the check in instruction), allowing for simple and convenient self check-in at a time that suits you

🏡 Sophie's Homes Welcome
At Sophie's Homes, we love welcoming guests and want you to feel right at home from the moment you arrive. We’re always happy to help if you need anything during your stay and are committed to making your visit comfortable, smooth, and memorable. ✨

Guests are welcome to request early check-in or late check-out for a small additional fee 😊
We’ll always do our best to accommodate, but this does depend on our cleaners’ schedule and availability.

Once you’ve booked, simply send your request through your Sophie’s Homes portal link.

If we’re unable to arrange it, standard check-in is from 3:00 PM and check-out is by 10:00 AM. Please note that late check-out without prior approval may incur additional fees.

Thanks so much for your understanding—we’ll always try to make your stay as comfortable as possible!

Other things to note
To help you settle in comfortably and enjoy a relaxing first night, we’ve prepared a complimentary starter pack for your stay, including:

🧻 2 toilet rolls
🫧 Washing-up liquid
🧽 Dish sponge
🧺 Cleaning cloth
🍽️ 2 dishwasher tablets (if Property has dishwasher)
👕 2 laundry tablets
☕ Tea & coffee-making facilities ready for your arrival

We hope these little touches help you feel at home from the moment you arrive. 💛

✨ Early Check-In & Late Check-Out ✨

Once you’ve booked with us, you’re welcome to request an early check-in or late check-out. These are subject to our cleaner’s schedule on the day, but we will always do everything we can to accommodate your request. 💛

🌐 To access check-in details, we will share a secure portal link after booking, which we are excited to share with you.

✨ The portal will also include recommendations for local attractions and guides to the property amenities.

❓ Please let us know if you have any questions about this.

title: A private jacuzzi and garden access
description:
Welcome to the Royal Suite, an expansive and luxurious space designed to offer the highest level of comfort, style, and functionality with a private Jacuzzi. The Royal Suite is truly our masterpiece, thoughtfully crafted with elegant finishes and generous proportions to deliver an exceptional stay experience.

The space
Located on the ground floor on the garden side, the suite features large sliding doors opening directly onto the garden, allowing natural light to flood the space while creating a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.



At the heart of the suite is a magnificent super king-size bed, beautifully styled with premium linens and elegant accents, offering exceptional comfort and a restful night’s sleep.



The suite boasts a beautifully arranged lounge area with two spacious sofas, creating a dedicated space for relaxation and social comfort. At the center sits a stunning real marble table, adding a touch of luxury and sophistication. This area is perfect for unwinding after a long day, enjoying a coffee, or simply relaxing in a refined and comfortable setting.



A standout feature is the impressive media wall with integrated ambient lighting and Smart TV with Netflix & YouTube (guests can log in with their own accounts), creating a sophisticated focal point within the room. The suite also benefits from underfloor heating, ensuring warmth and comfort throughout.



Designed with practicality in mind, the suite includes a large, well-organized wardrobe featuring a secure in-room safe, along with dedicated areas for shoes, jewellery, coats, and trousers, offering a boutique-style storage experience. A spacious dressing table with mirror and a large counter area with fridge and kettle add further convenience and elegance.



The luxurious en-suite bathroom completes the experience, featuring a jacuzzi bath alongside a modern walk-in shower, creating a perfect space to unwind and relax.



Blending space, sophistication, and premium amenities, the Royal Suite offers an exceptional stay defined by comfort, elegance, and refined luxury.

Guest access
To ensure a seamless and stress-free arrival, please confirm the correct number of guests prior to check-in.



The property offers convenient private driveway parking directly in front of the home. Should this space already be occupied, there is unrestricted on-street parking available nearby.



Access to the property is simple and secure via key card entry, which will be provided upon check-in, allowing you to enter and exit the property with ease throughout your stay.



For your peace of mind, CCTV is in operation covering all external areas of the property.



Please note: there are a couple of small steps from street level leading to the front entrance.

Other things to note
Strictly no parties or events

Any anti-social behaviour will result in immediate termination of your stay without refund

No smoking or vaping inside the property

External security cameras are in operation to ensure safety
Getting Around


Getting around from Moseley Luxury Stay is exceptionally easy and convenient.


The property is ideally located just a 6-minute walk from the nearest train station, providing fast and direct access to Birmingham city centre and major destinations.


Local buses also run frequently, making travel across the city simple and reliable.


For those who enjoy walking, Moseley is wonderfully pedestrian-friendly, with cafés, parks, and shops all within easy reach—including M&S just a short 6-minute stroll away.



Cyclists can take advantage of scenic routes such as the Cannon Hill Park cycle paths, while drivers benefit from quick access to major roads including the A38 and A435. Taxis and ride-hailing services are also readily available.



Whether travelling for business or leisure, you’ll find getting around both effortless and enjoyable.

description:
**Award Winning Grade 11 listed former Button Factory in the heart of Birmingham's Jewellery Quarter. Restored to modern day luxury liveability spaces for mid-long stays**

-- Refurbishment of the Year - 2025, iStructurE awards.

Brand new listing with photography and details being uploaded; get in touch for your bespoke Xmas booking needs and beyond...

3 x lounge spaces
3 x kitchen spaces
6 x bathrooms (+ 3 en suites)
8 bedrooms (9 double beds)

Get in touch...

Kira x

Other things to note
House rules

No Smoking (inside or on the property)
• No Pets
• No Parties or Events
• Check-in: Anytime after 4:00 PM
• Quiet Hours: To respect the neighborhood, please keep noise to a minimum between 11:00 PM to 7:00 AM.

To comply with our insurance and safety standards:

• ID Verification: For security purposes, a copy of a government-issued ID is required for all adult guests. Please send this via the Airbnb messaging center to receive your check-in details.

• Refundable Damage Deposit: We collect £250 to protect against damages.

For significant accidental damage or rule violations (such as unauthorized parties), this will be handled by Aircover via the resolution centre.

We appreciate your cooperation in helping us maintain a safe and high-quality environment for all our guests!

Thank You,
Guestel Ltd

—

Legal

"No Right to Possession" for Short, mid and long Stays
* Excluded Occupiers: Individuals in our serviced accommodation, holiday lets, are considered excluded occupiers and do not require a court order to be evicted.
* Lack of Exclusive Possession: We retain general control of the premises and can move the guest from room to room where required, the guest does not have exclusive possession.
* Licence vs. Tenancy: we provide a license for use, not a legal interest to use the premises, where guests have no rights to stay.

No tenancy is created and no security of tenure is granted.

title: Stylish Apartment* Jewellery Quarter* Netflix
description:
Modern 1-bedroom, 1-bath apartment in central Birmingham, ideal for short or long stays. The space features a comfortable bedroom with fresh linen, a modern bathroom, a cozy living area, and a fully equipped kitchen for home-cooked meals. There is excellent access to the city centre, business districts, shops, and restaurants. Well connected by public transport and major roads, it offers convenience & comfort in a prime location.

Street parking is paid during the day and free after 6:00 PM.

The space
This 1-bedroom 1-bathroom apartment is located in one of the most sought-after locations in Birmingham city centre. Seconds away from the famous Birmingham Canal and minutes away from one of Birmingham’s busiest business districts, Brindley Place, this apartment is situated within a prestigious residential complex, in a quiet area that combines comfort, convenience, and functionality.

The property is located in a residential building, with one spacious bedroom and one bathroom. The modern design and natural light will make the space feel like home, being the perfect alternative to a hotel, yet equipped with all hotel amenities such as toiletries, bed linen, tea, and coffee.

The kitchen provides guests with all the required appliances and cooking utensils to comfortably prepare their own meals. The living room and kitchen both have a contemporary design, and there is wooden flooring throughout the entire apartment. There is a comfortable sofa and a 50” Smart TV already equipped with a Netflix complimentary guest account, as well as high-speed WiFi throughout the property.

Ideal for both business professionals and tourists, this property is highly recommended for those who enjoy city centre living.

Please note that street parking is chargeable during the day and free of charge from 6:00 PM until 8:00 AM.

Guest access
You'll have full, private access to the apartment for the duration of your stay – no shared spaces. Enjoy the freedom to come and go as you please.

The key is stored inside the letterbox, which is secured with a code lock. You will receive the access code prior to your arrival. Upon check-in, simply enter the code to open the letterbox and retrieve the key. Please make sure to close it securely after use.

Other things to note
All guests are required to respect our community guidelines at all times:

• No parties or gatherings exceeding the maximum number of registered guests
• No smoking anywhere inside the property
• No unregistered or extra guests

Please be considerate of our neighbours and keep noise to a minimum after 10:00 PM.

Check-out is strictly at 11:00 AM. Unauthorised late check-outs will incur an additional charge.

Guests are fully responsible for any damages caused during their stay as a result of not following house rules. If such damages result in inconvenience to future guests, you will be liable for repair costs and any refunds issued due to the disruption.

title: Open-plan bungalow with a log burner
description:
Enjoy your stay in our stylish boutique style single-storey living home, just 8 mins from the world-renowned Belfry. Whether for a wedding, golf, the NEC (20 mins), or Drayton Manor (15 mins) its the perfect base.
Inside are designer bathrooms, a modern kitchen, and a premier Superking room. Our music studio with a high-quality sofa bed brings capacity to 8. Outside are two gardens, seating and a driveway for 5 cars. We’re just a short stroll from the shops and amenities of Walmley Village.

The space
Spacious open-plan bungalow with log burner. This beautifully presented, single-level home offers generous space and comfort, ideal for families or small groups. Here’s what awaits you:

Master bedroom with en-suite: Super king-size bed and private bathroom for added comfort.

Two double bedrooms: Stylish and comfortable, sharing a modern family bathroom.

Family bathroom: Well-appointed with a separate bath and walk-in shower.

Separate toilet: An additional WC for extra convenience.

Office space: A quiet spot for work or study, with the music studio providing a second versatile workspace.

Open-plan kitchen, dining and lounge: A bright, sociable space for cooking, dining and relaxing together.

Snug with log burner: Chill out zone with window seat and wood-burning stove – perfect for unwinding.

Fully equipped kitchen: Includes all modern appliances for stress-free self-catering.

Utility room: With washer and tumble dryer for your convenience.

WiFi and smart speakers: Fast, reliable internet.

Board games: A range of games for fun family evenings.

Side and rear gardens: Spacious outdoor areas with ample seating and dining space – ideal for relaxing or eating alfresco.

Driveway parking: Private parking for up to five cars.

"Whether you’re here for a local event, a wedding, or a work trip, I’ve worked hard to give this home a special holiday feel—it's the perfect spot to just relax with your favourite people."

Guest access
You will have full, private access to the entire bungalow, our creative music studio, and both gardens. Please note that the garage, loft, shed, and separate dressing room are kept locked for private storage and are not accessible. Aside from these areas, the home and the large 5-car driveway are yours to enjoy in complete privacy.

Other things to note
– Professional Standards: The home is professionally cleaned to the highest standard before every arrival.

– Ideal Location: A perfect base for families or groups visiting The Belfry, Birmingham, the NEC, or the local area.

– Flexible 4th Sleeping Area:
Our cosy music studio serves as the 4th bedroom/sleeping area and features a high-quality sofa bed. Please note this unique room is accessed via a single step and does not have a window, making it a very quiet and private space for either rest or work or watching Netflix!

Please advise if bedding is required for this space in advance of your stay.

title: The Loft
description:
Located only 12 minutes from Birmingham City Centre, The Loft combines modern finishes and rustic charm. This beautiful Loft treats our guests to all the luxuries and mesmerizing decor perfect for groups and families travelling for business & leisure. The spacious open living and games area offers plenty of space and games including the large multi-game Pool and Air Hockey table. Perfect for business trips, staycations, and weekend getaways, while exploring everything Birmingham has to offer.

The space
All of our interiors exhibit a modern take on a vintage design & you will find top-of-the-range hotel amenities to go with the apartment. It is meticulously designed to supersede in all aspects, from comfortability to basic Health & Safety and 24-hour customer service. The loft is very bright and airy with eclectic and modern furniture in every room with a combination of double and single beds perfect. Each bedroom offers comfortable beds and the bathrooms are equipped with all the essential toiletries needed during your stay. Our guests can have access to our Keurig coffee maker, fiber high-speed internet and SmartTv with Netflix and all the other streaming services. In the kitchen, you will find a free washing machine and tumble dryer.

Guest access
You will have access to the whole apartment including all the amenities that come with the apartment as per your booking.

Access to the following is available upon request: Travel cot and High Chair.

Other things to note
Please note the key collection is from a dead-end road in an alleyway that is well-lit at night. Detailed check-in information will be shared upon booking. Whilst the property is for you to enjoy during your stay, please understand that we do follow strict house rules and therefore it is important to treat and respect our property well.

host_about:
Welcome to an unforgettable stay that is about more than just a holiday. Our goal is to bring back wonder and excitement to your journey of life, and help you, your family, friends, colleagues, and teams reach new heights and create memories that will last a lifetime.

We are passionate about providing warm and attentive service that goes above and beyond to ensure your stay with us is meaningful, restorative, and aligned with your personal and professional goals. Whether you're looking to relax, explore, or achieve something new, we'll be there to help you every step of the way.

Our team of highly dedicated concierges are always available to provide personalized assistance and recommendations, from finding the best routes and activities based on your interests, to planning surprises and helping you out in a pinch. And if you speak a language other than English, we'd be happy to prepare for your stay and make sure you feel at home.

So why wait? Book your stay today and get ready for a truly amazing experience. And don't forget, we have a rewarding referral program, so bring your friends and loved ones for an even more memorable time.

Here's to your journey and the adventures ahead!

title: Modern flat in Birmingham’s creative quarter
description:
A Warm Welcome to Your Short-Term Stay✨
Reliable & Comfortable Short-Term Lets & Serviced Accommodation in the UK

🚨 Attention Attention!! - EXTRA 10% OFF Your Bookings When You Book Directly With Us Online. 🚨 (Please see Photo 5 or Additional Photos) 💥🎉

✅ Ideal for Short Getaways with Exclusive Discounts 💸

✅ Perfect for families, relocators, business stays, and contractors 🏡

✅ Easy access to the centre & attractions🛍️

✅ Nearby parking for convenience 🚗

The space
Stylish 1-Bed Apartment in Digbeth Square 🏙️

Welcome to our modern one-bedroom apartment in Digbeth Square – a vibrant city-centre base ideal for business travellers, couples and weekend stays. Located in Birmingham’s creative quarter, you’re within easy reach of major business hubs, shopping, dining and nightlife.

⸻

🛏️ The Space
• Bedroom: Comfortable double bed with hotel-quality linen
• Living area: Stylish lounge with seating and dining space
• Kitchen: Fully equipped kitchen with oven, hob, fridge-freezer, kettle and cookware
• Bathroom: Modern bathroom with shower, fresh towels and toiletries
• Connectivity: Fast WiFi throughout – ideal for remote working
• Extras: Smart TV, wardrobe storage, iron & ironing board

Ideal for solo travellers, couples and corporate stays.

⸻

📍 Location – Digbeth & City Centre

Digbeth is one of Birmingham’s most vibrant districts, known for its creative scene, independent venues and excellent access to the city centre.

⸻

🛍️ Shops & Essentials
• Local convenience stores – 2 mins walk
• Bullring & Grand Central – 8 mins walk
• City Centre supermarkets & high-street shopping – 10 mins walk

⸻

🍽️ Restaurants, Cafés & Bars
• Custard Factory bars & eateries – 4 mins walk
• Digbeth Dining Club – 5 mins walk
• City Centre restaurants & cocktail bars – 8–10 mins walk

⸻

🎤 Sports, Entertainment & Culture
• O2 Academy Birmingham – 6 mins walk
• Birmingham Hippodrome – 10 mins walk
• Utilita Arena Birmingham – 12 mins drive / 20 mins walk
• NEC & Resorts World Arena – 15–20 mins drive

⸻

💼 Business & Corporate Hubs
• Birmingham City Centre offices – 10 mins walk
• Colmore Business District – 12 mins walk
• Brindleyplace – 15 mins walk

⸻

🚆 Transport Links
• Birmingham New Street Station – 8 mins walk
• Moor Street Station – 6 mins walk
• Digbeth Coach Station – 5 mins walk
• Birmingham Airport – 20 mins drive / direct train available

⸻

⭐ Guests Love

✔ Central Digbeth location
✔ Full kitchen & fast WiFi
✔ Comfortable double bed
✔ Easy access to business, shopping & nightlife

Guest access
Private access and self check in - Enjoy the entire property on your stay!

Other things to note
Welcome — Everything You Need for a Great Stay
We're genuinely glad to have you. Before you arrive, here's the honest, important stuff — because every great stay comes with a little housekeeping, and we'd rather you knew it all up front than discovered it later. We're the property management team looking after your stay, and we'd rather be straight with you than leave anything to guesswork — so here's the practical side, kept clear and simple.
One thing to know from the start: every property we manage is someone's home — often a place they care deeply about. Treat it as you'd want a guest to treat yours, and you and the next guest will both have a brilliant stay. That's really all we ask.
Right — let's get you sorted.

1. 📲 Your Guest Portal — Start Here
Before your stay, you'll receive a personalised welcome message with access to your Guest Portal. Think of it as your digital concierge: it has your access codes, WiFi details, check-in steps, and local recommendations all in one place.

Please open your welcome message and find your Guest Portal before your arrival day — a few minutes now means a seamless arrival later.
Access codes are released through the portal once your quick verification is complete.
📖 The portal also has handy guides — including step-by-step help for the heating and induction hob. If something isn't behaving, the Guides section is the fastest way to an answer.

We run all our homes on self check-in — no reception desk, no waiting around for a key handover. It's your space from the moment you arrive.

2. 🔑 Keys & the Lockbox — Please Read This One
Keys cause more avoidable charges than anything else, so here's the deal, plainly:

On arrival, your keys are in the lockbox — your portal tells you exactly where and how.
On check-out, return the keys to the same lockbox. Please don't leave them inside the property.
🔒 Keys left inside the property mean we're locked out and need a call-out to recover them — sometimes these are restricted security keys that can't simply be re-cut. The recovery cost — typically £150, in line with average locksmith call-out rates — is charged via Airbnb as a valid charge.
If you're locked out or lose a key, don't panic — we can arrange a call-out to help. The cost of this is typically £150 (the average locksmith/call-out rate) and is charged accordingly. Everyone checking in is an adult, so we ask you to keep keys safe; we're always happy to help, but we can't absorb the cost when a key is lost.

Keep the keys with you, return them to the lockbox, and this section never applies to you. Easy. 👍

3. 🕓 Check-In & Check-Out

Check-in: from 16:00
Check-out: by 10:00

Need a little more time either side? Early check-in and late check-out can sometimes be arranged — request it through your Guest Portal. It's subject to availability, confirmed only once our cleaning team gives the green light, and confirmed once payment is made through the portal. Until you hear back from us, the standard times stand.

4. ✅ Before You Check Out — Quick Checklist
A 60-second list to make check-out painless:

🗑️ Take rubbish out to the correct bins
🔑 Return all keys to the lockbox (not inside the property)
🪟 Close windows and lock the door
🧼 Leave the place tidy — no need to deep clean, just as you'd hope to find it

Nail those four and you're done — thank you! 🙏

5. 💬 Getting Help — and What Counts as an Emergency
Our support team is here for you 09:00–22:00 daily. Your Guest Portal has a contact number for messages and enquiries, plus an automated line to get quick answers to common questions any time.

General enquiries (and most things, honestly) are handled during office hours — so where you can, please complete check-in and verification before 22:00.
Genuine emergencies don't wait for office hours. For anything involving fire, gas, flooding, or your immediate safety, always call the emergency services first (999). For urgent property issues like a lockout, use the call-out option above — we've got you.

We'll always troubleshoot with you remotely first; it's usually the quickest fix.

6. 🛏️ Making Yourself at Home (It's Self-Catering, Not a Hotel)
We give you a comfortable, independent base — fresh linen and towels are all set for you. What we don't stock is the hotel-style extras, so a quick heads-up so you can come prepared:

☕ No food, drinks or condiments — tea, coffee, sugar, milk, salt, oils and the like. Pop to the local shop or bring your favourites.
🧴 No toiletries or consumables — shower gel, shampoo, soap, dishwasher tablets. For hygiene and consistency we leave these to you.

It's a small bit of prep that makes the place truly yours for your stay. 🛒

7. 🛋️ Beds & Bedding
Your beds are made up and ready. A couple of things on sofa beds:

Where a home has a sofa bed, we make it up automatically only when the booking is at full guest capacity.
If you're not at full capacity but plan to use the sofa bed, just request the extra bedding in advance through your portal — otherwise we'll assume the standard beds are all you need.
A call-out for unrequested extra bedding may carry a charge of up to £50, and call-outs can't be made after 21:00 (we'll sort it the next morning). Requesting ahead avoids all of this.


8. 🚗 Parking
A quick one that saves disappointment on arrival:

Parking is only included if the listing explicitly says so. If it doesn't mention parking, please assume there's none reserved for you.
We're always happy to share nearby parking recommendations, but anything we suggest is at your own cost and arrangement.
Where a listing says "free parking included," that means one (1) allocated space, unless stated otherwise.

If parking matters to you, do double-check before you travel. 🅿️

9. ♿ Accessibility
So there are no surprises at the door: please assume stair access only unless the listing clearly states otherwise (lift, step-free access, etc.).
If accessibility is important for your stay, message us before booking and we'll happily confirm exactly what a specific property offers. We'd always rather get you in the right home from the start.

10. 🏡 Respecting the Home & Neighbours
This is the "someone's home" part, and it matters.

Look after the place as if it were your own — a little care goes a long way, and it keeps our homes lovely for you and the next guest.
🔇 Be mindful of neighbours. Most of our homes share buildings or streets with residents, so please keep noise considerate, especially in the evenings and overnight.
🗑️ On the way out, pop any rubbish into the correct communal or residential bins — your portal shows you where.
✨ And a gentle note: lived-in homes show minor cosmetic wear now and then — a small mark here or there. It's normal, and never affects the comfort or safety of your stay.


11. 📹 CCTV & Your Privacy
Some buildings have communal CCTV in shared areas like entrances or car parks. These are run by the building management, not by us. There is never any CCTV inside our properties — your privacy indoors is absolute.

12. 🏛️ Grade II Listed Buildings
A few of our homes sit in Grade II listed buildings, which are beautiful but come with heritage rules — some features (like certain windows) may be fixed or limited to protect the building. If you need windows that open or specific ventilation, just ask before booking and we'll confirm.

13. 🛡️ Security Deposit / Stay Protection Fee
Depending on the property, and clearly shown on the listing when you book, one of the following applies:

a refundable security deposit of £350, taken as a pre-authorisation, or
a non-refundable Stay Protection Fee (typically £34.99–£49.99).

What a pre-authorisation actually is: it's not a charge — just a temporary hold that reserves the amount without taking your money. It's released on check-out day after our cleaning and inventory check. Once released, it can take up to 10 days to disappear from your account, depending entirely on your bank's processing times. That part is standard banking, outside our control, and we're not able to speed it up — so please don't worry if it lingers a few days.
How it's taken: as a software-connected Airbnb partner, our deposits and protection fees are taken independently through our own secure payment system rather than through Airbnb, which is permitted for software-connected hosts. The option that applies is always disclosed on the listing before you book. Any damage matter is handled fairly and on the basis of evidence.

14. 📄 The Terms of Stay (the Short Version)
All guests review and sign our Terms of Stay before check-in — standard practice that keeps things safe, clear and fair for everyone. In short, they cover:

👥 Guest numbers — the number checking in must match the booking. Extra, unbooked guests may mean the booking is cancelled without refund.
🤝 Care & conduct — treat the home and shared spaces with respect, and bins out on departure.
💷 Damage — any damage to the property or its contents is charged in line with the signed terms (with evidence, always).
🔑 Keys — keep them safe and return them to the lockbox. Lost keys, key-related call-outs, or keys left inside the property are charged at the recovery cost incurred — typically £150, in line with average locksmith/call-out rates — requested through Airbnb as a valid charge.
🚫 No parties or events — strictly not allowed. Any sign of a party means immediate cancellation without refund.
🚫 Zero tolerance for abuse — aggressive or abusive behaviour toward our team won't be tolerated and may, at our discretion, end the reservation without refund.
✅ Verification — the lead booker completes a quick identity verification.

None of this is meant to feel heavy — it's simply how we keep every home, and every stay, to the standard you'd want.

15. 🔧 If Something Isn't Right
Please tell us as soon as you notice it, so we can put it right while you're still here — that's almost always the quickest path to a happy fix, and our team will troubleshoot with you remotely first.
We work with our own maintenance team, and for anything we can't resolve on the spot we bring in trusted contractors. Occasionally that means timing is led by their availability — but we'll keep you updated the whole way and always work to get it sorted as fast as we can.

16. 💛 We're Here to Help
Anything at all before or during your stay — just reach out through your Guest Portal. We want you to feel comfortable, confident, and completely at home.
Thanks for reading to the end (most don't!) — now go enjoy your stay. We're really pleased to be hosting you.

title: 20% off | City Stay - Gym, Co-Work, Skyline Views
description:
Modern studio living in central Birmingham, designed for professionals who value workspace, connectivity and location.

This apartment is part of Valore Living by Valore Property Services - our modern, affordable city-living collection offering high-quality accommodation with exceptional shared amenities.

Ideal for contractors, corporate teams, relocations and longer stays.

The space
A space focused on delivering modern, affordable stays supported by high-quality communal facilities.

Inside the studio you will find:
- A small double bed, suitable for one adult or a cosy stay for two
- Compact kitchenette suitable for light cooking (we do not supply oil/salt & pepper)
- Dedicated workspace and high-speed Wi-Fi
- Modern en-suite shower room
- Clean, functional design with natural light

Please note there is no TV in the studio. Guests are encouraged to use the cinema room and communal lounges within the building.

Guest access
Guests have private access to their own studio apartment.

You will also have shared access to the building’s communal amenities, including the co-working spaces, gym, cinema room, games room, karaoke room and laundry facilities, subject to building rules and availability.

For corporate, contractor or relocation bookings, multiple studios can be allocated within the same building, subject to availability.

Other things to note
This listing is part of Valore Living by Valore Property Services and is offered as a modern, affordable accommodation option designed around shared amenities rather than in-room extras.

To ensure expectations are clear:
- There is no TV in the studio
- The bed is a small double
- The kitchenette is compact and suitable for light cooking
- Communal areas are shared with other residents
- No on-site parking is available

In return, guests benefit from access to professional co-working spaces, high-speed Wi-Fi, gym, cinema room, games room, karaoke room and laundry facilities, offering excellent value for longer and work-related stays.

Multiple units available:
This building contains multiple identical studios. We welcome group bookings, contractor teams, corporate projects, relocations and insurance stays. Discounted rates are available for longer stays or multiple units. Please message us before booking if you require more than one studio.///

House Rules & Policies

• Check-in: 3:00 PM | Check-out: 10:00 AM
• No parties or loud music. A £250 fee will be charged for disturbances
• No smoking anywhere in the building. A fine of up to £1,000 may apply
• £100 fee for lost keys or fobs
• All guests must be declared before check-in via a secure Airbnb link
• CCTV operates in communal areas only for the safety of residents and guests
• The property is professionally managed, maintained and cleaned before every stay
• Quiet hours apply. This is a professionally managed residential building
• An optional damage waiver may be offered prior to arrival through our secure guest portal. This is entirely optional and does not affect your booking.

Management & Hosting

Managed by Valore Property Services, trusted short-let specialists delivering professionally managed accommodation across the UK.

Questions or special requirements? Message us anytime, we are here to help.

Important Guest Information

Please note that all guests are required to provide the names of everyone staying and photo ID for the lead guest before check-in.
This will be requested via a secure link through Airbnb messaging and is required for security and insurance purposes only.
