title: Modern Deritend flat near Digbeth
description:
Welcome to our stylish apartment in the heart of Deritend, just moments from Digbeth and Birmingham City Centre. Perfect for business or leisure, the apartment offers a comfortable living space, a fully equipped kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, and everything you need for a relaxing stay. Enjoy easy access to the Bullring, restaurants, cafés, nightlife, and excellent transport links, making it the ideal base for exploring Birmingham.

The space
⭐ Why Guests Love Staying Here

Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Deritend, Birmingham (B12 0PS). Whether you're visiting for business, a family getaway, a city break, or a longer stay, this modern and comfortable apartment offers everything you need for a relaxing and hassle-free experience. Conveniently located close to Digbeth, Birmingham City Centre, the Bullring Shopping Centre, restaurants, cafés, nightlife, and excellent transport links, you'll have the city's best attractions within easy reach.

🏠 Entire Home

Enjoy exclusive access to the entire property throughout your stay. With no shared spaces, you'll have complete privacy and the freedom to relax, work, or spend quality time with family and friends at your own pace.

🛏 Comfortable Bedrooms

The apartment features 2 well-appointed bedrooms, each furnished with a comfortable double bed, quality mattresses, fresh hotel-quality linen, and ample storage space. Designed to provide a peaceful night's sleep after a busy day exploring Birmingham or attending meetings.

👥 Sleeps Up to 4 Guests

Perfectly suited for families, friends, couples, contractors, or business travellers, comfortably accommodating up to four guests.

🛋 Spacious Living Area

Unwind in the bright and welcoming lounge featuring comfortable seating and a Smart TV. Whether you're watching your favourite series, enjoying a movie night, or simply relaxing with a coffee, this cosy space is perfect for spending time together.

🍳 Fully Equipped Kitchen

Prepare anything from a quick breakfast to a home-cooked dinner in the fully equipped kitchen, complete with:

Oven and hob
Microwave
Fridge and freezer
Kettle and toaster
Pots, pans, cooking utensils
Plates, bowls, glasses and cutlery
Complimentary tea and coffee essentials (where provided)

Everything you need for a comfortable self-catering stay is ready for your convenience.

🛁 Modern Bathroom

The stylish bathroom includes a spacious shower, fresh towels, toiletries, hand wash, and essential amenities, ensuring a clean and refreshing experience throughout your stay.

📶 Fast & Free Wi-Fi

Stay connected with reliable high-speed internet throughout the property, making it ideal for remote working, streaming, video calls, online meetings, or keeping in touch with family and friends.

💼 Dedicated Workspace

A practical workspace with a desk and chair provides a comfortable environment for working remotely, studying, or planning your itinerary.

📺 Smart Entertainment

Enjoy a Smart TV where you can sign in to your favourite streaming services and unwind after a busy day.

🚗 Parking: Paid Street Parking
Paid on-street parking is available nearby, subject to local parking regulations, availability, and applicable parking charges. Guests are responsible for checking signage and paying any required parking fees during their stay.

📍 Excellent Location
Situated in Deritend, you'll be within easy reach of Birmingham's most popular attractions, shopping destinations, restaurants, cafés, entertainment venues, and business districts. Excellent public transport links make travelling around the city simple and convenient.

🔑 Easy Self Check-In

Enjoy a stress-free arrival with secure self check-in. Detailed instructions will be sent before your arrival, allowing you to check in at a time that suits you.

🚭 House Rules
No smoking or vaping inside the property.
No parties, events, or excessive noise.
Please respect our neighbours and help us maintain a peaceful environment for everyone.

We look forward to welcoming you and hope you enjoy a comfortable, relaxing, and memorable stay in Birmingham.

Guest access
🔑 Guest Access & Welcome
Guests will have full private access to the entire property for the duration of their stay, ensuring complete comfort and privacy throughout your visit.

📦 Easy Self Check-In
Access is via a keynest (you need to collect it to the address that will be given to you on the check in instruction), allowing for simple and convenient self check-in at a time that suits you

🏡 Sophie's Homes Welcome
At Sophie's Homes, we love welcoming guests and want you to feel right at home from the moment you arrive. We’re always happy to help if you need anything during your stay and are committed to making your visit comfortable, smooth, and memorable. ✨

Guests are welcome to request early check-in or late check-out for a small additional fee 😊
We’ll always do our best to accommodate, but this does depend on our cleaners’ schedule and availability.

Once you’ve booked, simply send your request through your Sophie’s Homes portal link.

If we’re unable to arrange it, standard check-in is from 3:00 PM and check-out is by 10:00 AM. Please note that late check-out without prior approval may incur additional fees.

Thanks so much for your understanding—we’ll always try to make your stay as comfortable as possible!

Other things to note
✨ What to Expect on Arrival ✨

To help you settle in comfortably and enjoy a relaxing first night, we’ve prepared a complimentary starter pack for your stay, including:

🧻 2 toilet rolls
🫧 Washing-up liquid
🧽 Dish sponge
🧺 Cleaning cloth
🍽️ 2 dishwasher tablets (if Property has dishwasher)
👕 2 laundry tablets
☕ Tea & coffee-making facilities ready for your arrival

We hope these little touches help you feel at home from the moment you arrive. 💛

✨ Early Check-In & Late Check-Out ✨

Once you’ve booked with us, you’re welcome to request an early check-in or late check-out. These are subject to our cleaner’s schedule on the day, but we will always do everything we can to accommodate your request. 💛

🌐 To access check-in details, we will share a secure portal link after booking, which we are excited to share with you.

✨ The portal will also include recommendations for local attractions and guides to the property amenities.

❓ Please let us know if you have any questions about this.

title: Wonderful Stay With Nature & Fun
description:
Are you in need of a luxurious, tranquil base for your extended or short stay in Birmingham?

Look no further, our Jasmine base is the perfect home for your adventure in the midlands!

Our exclusive, peaceful location surrounded by nature is a pebble’s throw away from all of the city’s most popular attractions.

The space
Self check in with Free Gated Parking, Free ultra-speed WiFi, thoughtful breakfast ingredients and fun activities.

A lovely personal welcome table with fun and delicious goodies also awaits you and your family/ group.

Lots to do!

In under 15-30 minutes, find yourself at:
- The Bear Grylls Adventure Experience.
- Cadbury World.
- Drayton Manor Theme Park.
- Cinema
- Sea World Centre
- Lego Discovery centre
- Thinktank Museum.
- Famous zoos
- Action Trampolining
- Climbing Park
- Bowling
- Cliff Lakes, lake water park
- Live dining
- Visit the most excellent and distinct dining and buffet experiences in the Midlands, there's something for everyone .

Sleeps 6 with an additional pull out bed for a 7th and features luxurious bedrooms, a self-check-in process, and a free gated car park.

You'll love the large TV with access to Netflix, Amazon, and Disney+ as well as our hyperfast internet. The fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and dryer will make it easy for you to feel at home during an extended stay.
Large cooking pot and blender.
Bike rentals, bike child carrier seats, travel cots, and over 40 other amenities available or accessible upon request.

In addition to all of these amenities, your beautiful space will be located in a pristine quiet residential area with access to nature and lakes, beautiful swans and ducks to feed and small dear. The private entrance, cycle rides and scenic views will make you feel right at home, and the close proximity to public transportation, food supplies, and an additional launderette make it easy to get around.

Guest access
And for those special moments, you can request our movie projector with treats and popcorn and celebrate in style. Our team is also available to help plan and create special surprises, with decorations, activities, or themed memorabilia to make your stay unforgettable.

Other things to note
Whether you're looking for a peaceful escape, a cosy base, a romantic gesture or a lovely surprise for all your loved ones, our relaxing Airbnb has everything you need for an enjoyable and exciting stress-free stay. Book now to enjoy our Special offer in celebration of our 2 year anniversary on Airbnb🎉.

title: Appleblossomcaravans, Butlins, Minehead, Uk
description:
Our caravan is a very home from home place to stay. There are 3 bedrooms with one with a double bed, two with two single beds and a double pull out sofa in the living area. The caravan is set in beautufk greenery amongst other caravans on Lakeside Quay at Butlins Minehead. It is a 5 minute walk from all amenities, ie the skyline, Water Splash pool with lots of big slides to go on, very extensive arcade, a bowling alley, a cinema, football courts, fairground rides and go kart.

The space
There are 3 public houses on site to eat at, amongst other eating places placed inside the skyline. There are two shops available to get all your essentials that you need. Also a laundrette is available nearby on-site too. If you are a keen on fishing the caravan site has a big lake in the middle of it to do so. Minehead itself is literally a 10 to 15 minute walk into the centre of it with plenty of shops and cafes to visit. The beach is literally a 2 minute walk from where our caravan is situated . Minehead in Somerset is a beautiful part of the UK. It attracts thousands and thousands of tourists each year. It also has the old steam engine trains go through it. It's a place not to miss .

We can provide all bed linen at £25 for 8 people. There will also be a £10 admin fee to pay ontop of any booking which Butlins itself charge. The booking form with all people holidaying will be sent by Butlins themselves. All names ages and date of birth along with addresses will be required when booking also. This ensures our and your safety through Butlins and shows everything is up and above board 🙂

title: The Signature Suite
description:
Welcome to the Signature Room, a spacious and elegantly designed retreat that combines comfort, functionality, and modern style. The Signature Room is another masterpiece in our collection, thoughtfully designed to offer a premium and relaxing stay experience.

The space
Located on the ground floor on the garden side, the room provides a peaceful and relaxing setting, with direct access to the outdoors through a sliding door leading to the garden—perfect for enjoying fresh air and natural surroundings.



At the heart of the room is a luxurious super king-size bed, dressed in high-quality linens and soft neutral tones, creating a calm and inviting space for restful nights. Natural light fills the room, enhancing its bright and airy feel.



A standout feature of the Signature Room is its separate seating area, offering generous space to unwind. With comfortable chairs and a stylish layout, it’s ideal for relaxing, reading, or enjoying quiet moments in a more private setting.



The room also includes a dedicated dressing table and mirror area, combining practicality with elegance. A large wardrobe provides ample storage, ensuring a clutter-free and comfortable stay.



Modern comforts are seamlessly integrated, including a Smart TV with Netflix & YouTube (guests can log in with their own accounts), fridge, kettle, and a secure in-room safe. The addition of underfloor heating ensures warmth and comfort throughout your stay.



The spacious en-suite bathroom features a large, contemporary design with a walk-in shower and high-quality finishes, completing the experience with both luxury and practicality.



With its generous space, garden access, and thoughtfully designed features, the Signature Room offers a refined and relaxing stay with a true sense of comfort and style.

Guest access
To ensure a seamless and stress-free arrival, please confirm the correct number of guests prior to check-in.



The property offers convenient private driveway parking directly in front of the home. Should this space already be occupied, there is unrestricted on-street parking available nearby.



Access to the property is simple and secure via key card entry, which will be provided upon check-in, allowing you to enter and exit the property with ease throughout your stay.



For your peace of mind, CCTV is in operation covering all external areas of the property.



Please note: there are a couple of small steps from street level leading to the front entrance.

Other things to note
Strictly no parties or events

Any anti-social behaviour will result in immediate termination of your stay without refund

No smoking or vaping inside the property

External security cameras are in operation to ensure safety

Getting Around


Getting around from Moseley Luxury Stay is exceptionally easy and convenient.



The property is ideally located just a 6-minute walk from the nearest train station, providing fast and direct access to Birmingham city centre and major destinations.



Local buses also run frequently, making travel across the city simple and reliable.



For those who enjoy walking, Moseley is wonderfully pedestrian-friendly, with cafés, parks, and shops all within easy reach—including M&S just a short 6-minute stroll away.



Cyclists can take advantage of scenic routes such as the Cannon Hill Park cycle paths, while drivers benefit from quick access to major roads including the A38 and A435. Taxis and ride-hailing services are also readily available.



Whether travelling for business or leisure, you’ll find getting around both effortless and enjoyable.

title: Kula Birmingham - 2 Bed Penthouse Apartment
description:
A two-bedroom penthouse apartment at the top of a brand new building that opened in August 2024. Two bedrooms, elevated position, fully equipped kitchen, dedicated workspace, modern bathroom and the best views in the building. Lift access throughout.

The space
Few UK cities are changing faster than Birmingham right now. Queensgate puts you right in the middle of it. New restaurants, independent culture and some of the best transport connections in the country, all within easy reach.
67 apartments across seven floors with lift access, including studios, one and two-bedroom options. Full kitchens, washer/dryers, king-size beds and fast wifi throughout. The penthouse apartments on the seventh floor have city views.
There is no reception on site but the team is available around the clock. Self check-in with full details sent once your verification form is complete.

Guest access
Self check-in from 3pm. Before you arrive we will send a simple online form asking for a copy of your valid government-issued ID and a signed T&Cs and £150 Deposit. Once that is done you will receive all your arrival details including key retrieval instructions and directions.

Other things to note
We look after 67 apartments in this building. Every unit is kept to the same style and standard, though the exact apartment may vary slightly depending on availability. There is lift access to the building. Pets are welcome at £20 per pet per night. Our team is available 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Just message us and someone will get back to you quickly.

title: Modern 2BR Flat in Birmingham's Jewellery Quarter!
description:
Set in the heart of Birmingham's vibrant Jewellery Quarter, this stylish two-bedroom apartment offers the perfect base for business trips, weekend getaways and even longer stays!

Enjoy the light and spacious living areas, fully-fitted kitchen as well as fast and reliable WiFi throughout the property.

You'll be just a short walk from some of Birmingham's best bars, cafés and restaurants with major attractions sitting right on your doorstep. Nearby paid parking is also available for added ease.

The space
Designed with comfort, style and convenience in mind, this beautifully appointed flat offers everything you need for a relaxing and memorable stay:

- Two spacious bedrooms, with one featuring a comfortable double bed and the other offering two single beds making it perfect for families, friends or even business travellers

- A bright, open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a fully fitted and contemporary kitchen

- A luxurious shower-bathroom, finished to a high standard and stocked with all the essentials for a refreshing stay

- A dedicated workspace in one of the bedrooms, providing a quiet and comfortable environment for remote working

- A 55" Ultra HD 4K Smart TV with access to premium streaming services including Netflix

- High-Speed WiFi throughout the property ensuring seamless streaming, crystal-clear video calls and reliable connectivity throughout your stay

- A premium coffee machine, allowing you to enjoy café-quality drinks, from the comfort of your flat, at any time of the day

Guest access
Guests will have full-access to the entire apartment with convenient self check-in available via a secure key safe.

Other things to note
If you wish to bring pets to the property - please kindly send an enquiry with the number and type of pets.

host_about:
Hi everyone!..

 I manage properties here and abroad, short and long term rentals. Our apartments, condos and Villas are just stunning and really will be everything you want out of self catering holidays or trips, business or pleasure. As a host I am always on hand to assist with anything you may need or any questions you have whilst staying in the properties without interference so you can just relax and enjoy the space. I aim to make it a home from home experience for travellers so they have all the comforts they need.

I love to travel and have recently been to Canada,  Mexico, Florida, Portugal, Spain, Majorca, Lanzarote, France, Cyprus, Germany, Belgium, Luxembourg, Greece (Santorini and Rhodes) and Turkey. Ive had a blast. My favourite places are Greece and Canada so far. Personally I love to stay in self-catering apartments as you get to really experience the culture, local food and atmosphere. 

Originally from Oxford, UK I now live in Birmingham UK with my husband and 2 sons.

title: Balcony View Apt - Free Parking
description:
This unique apartment has a style of it's own. Nestled within a nature park and within close proximity to the motorway, making it an ideal location for anyone travelling into the area for business. The apartment is within good access to Solihull Town Centre and Birmingham city centre. This location is ideal for business guests and contractors. The Airport and the NEC for those all important events are a short drive away. We also have lovely walking trails within the park.*Strictly no Parties*

The space
The property is newly built and furnished with all modern living facilities. We have designed it with luxury and comfort in mind. For your convenience the main bedroom has ensuite bathroom facilities, lovely open plan living room and kitchen - fully equipped to a very high standard, beautiful decor, tea and coffee, linen, towels and toiletries are all provided as well . It also has a self contained utility area with washing machine/drier. We have enjoyed putting it together and we really hope you like it as much as we do.

In addition the property has a balcony where you can get some fresh air, sit out, enjoy and take in the environment. The Apartment also has 2 dedicated parking spaces and sleeps up to 5 guests.

LONG STAY CONTRACTORS MOST WELCOME - REDUCED RATES AVAILABLE!!

The location is also ideal for anyone wishing to explore nearby areas such as Stratford Upon Avon, Shakespeare's birth place and Leamington Spa as it sit a stone's throw away from the M42, Solihull etc.

Close to Birmingham's airport and main road links and NEC/Resorts World on your doorstep.

There is a Gym with Pool next door, which you can enjoy, please note membership required.
**We have a strict No Parties; No Gatherings; No Loud Music and No Smoking on any part of the property, including the balcony. Please note, we have noise monitoring within the Apt. Should guests disregard any of the above you will be removed from the property**

Guest access
2 Free allocated parking available. Number plate required prior to check in to register your vehicle

Other things to note
We ask that you sre mundful of our neighbours while staying at the apartment.
NO SMOKING ANYWHERE IN OR AROUND THE APARTMENT
NO PARTIES
NO MORE THAN 5 GUESTS ALLOWED - please note we do monitor noise and crowding at this apartment.

title: Apartment 1, St Pauls, No1 High Street
description:
No. 1 High Street is a Grade II listed building and one of the most historically significant properties in Coleshill. Its architectural history spans three centuries. The main frontage—what you recognise today as the imposing three‑storey Georgian façade—was constructed in the early 18th century.

Just minutes from Coleshill Parkway and with excellent access to the M6 and M42. A short walk from local pubs, cafés, independent shops, and scenic countryside paths.

title: Cozy House in Prime, Central Location
description:
Frederick Street

Set right in the heart of Birmingham, this bright and stylish two bedroom flat is built for people who want to arrive, settle in, and get on with things. Whether you're in town for work, a project contract, or a proper city break, you'll find a calm and comfortable base just steps from everything.

The space comfortably sleeps up to four, so it works just as well for a pair of colleagues on a long stay as it does for a small family or group of friends exploring the city.

The space
What you'll love:

✓ Prime central location with the best of Birmingham on your doorstep
✓ Two spacious bedrooms, sleeping up to four
✓ Fast, free WiFi throughout (ideal for remote work and video calls)
✓ Flexible cancellation for peace of mind
✓ Long stay discounts for extended bookings
✓ Paid parking available nearby
✓ Perfectly suited to business travellers and contractors

Check in is smooth and stress free, and our team is on hand throughout your stay. If you need anything at all, a quick message is all it takes. We genuinely want your time here to feel effortless from the moment you arrive to the moment you leave.

Book your stay with Clarendon Stays and experience Birmingham done properly.

BED CONFIGURATION
Bedroom 1: 1x King
Bedroom 2: 1x King
Two generous doubles, so a group of four contractors or colleagues each gets a proper room and a great night's sleep.

KEY FEATURES
Free WiFi throughout
Paid parking available nearby
Long stay discounts for extended bookings
Weekly cleans included as standard

DINING & WORKSPACE
The open dining table comfortably seats four, with a handy breakfast bar alongside. Whether it's a shared meal at the end of the day, a quick coffee before an early start, or a laptop set up for a morning of calls, there's plenty of room to eat, gather, and work.

KITCHEN
Fully equipped for everything from a quick breakfast to a proper home cooked dinner. You'll find a gas hob and oven, fridge freezer, microwave, kettle, coffee machine, and a washing machine for longer stays.

BATHROOMS
Two full bathrooms mean no queuing in the morning. One has an overhead shower, toilet, and sink; the other offers a full bath tub and toilet for a proper soak after a long day.

Every Clarendon Stays property comes with enhanced cleaning, spacious living areas, and a fully equipped kitchen as standard. With dedicated workspaces and fast, free WiFi throughout, it's an ideal base for key workers, contractors, and business travellers who need somewhere that just works.

Guest access
Guests will have full, private access to the entire house, including the kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom. Free private parking is included.

We operate on a self check-in/check-out system with a secure lockbox, so you can arrive and leave at your convenience.

Our team at Clarendon Stays is always happy to help. If you have any questions or queries, you can easily reach us via Airbnb, email, or phone. We aim to make your stay as smooth and hassle-free as possible.

Other things to note
We keep the property professionally cleaned so you can settle in with ease. Free WiFi is included, and we offer discounts for longer stays — plus weekly cleans if you’re with us a bit longer.

Your check-in details will be sent on the day of arrival at 12:00 PM.

Quiet hours are from 23:00 to 07:00 to ensure a restful environment for all.

Just a quick note: no smoking, no parties, and no pets — thanks for helping us keep the space comfortable for everyone.

title: Hot Tub Hideaway | Private Retreat
description:
Escape to The Hideaway, a peaceful private retreat perfect for relaxing breaks. Enjoy your own sheltered hot tub in a secluded setting, ideal in any weather. The cosy, modern space offers comfort, warmth, and Wi-Fi, making it perfect for couples or solo stays. Quiet, private, and designed for unwinding, The Hideaway is your ideal place to switch off and recharge.

The space
The property features a comfortable small double bed along with a double sofa bed located in the open-plan kitchen/living area, allowing the space to accommodate up to four guests. Please note, the base booking covers two guests, and there is an additional charge of £50 per guest, per night for any guests over two.

Guest access
Guests have full and private access to the entire Hideaway during their stay. The space is exclusively yours, including the living area, kitchen facilities, sleeping areas, bathroom, and outdoor hot tub area (if booked). There are no shared spaces, allowing you to relax and enjoy complete privacy throughout your visit.

Other things to note
Important Guest Information – The Hideaway
Please note: If a booking for The Hideaway is made after 10:00pm, the hot tub may not be available for use on the first evening. This is because time is required to properly prepare, clean, and heat the water to ensure it is ready for safe use. Hot tub availability from the following day onwards will not be affected.

For your safety and peace of mind, CCTV is installed at the front, side, and rear of the property for security purposes only. Cameras do not monitor any private areas, including the hot tub.

Welcome to The Hallmark, a stylish and spacious 3-bedroom apartment in Birmingham City Centre’s Jewellery Quarter, designed for families, groups, contractors, business travellers, and long stays.

title: Dartboard, private garden, and van parking
description:
Minstead Houses in the Erdington Area of Birmingham B24 is a Spacious 5-bedroom, 9 Beds Contractor Crew House with 3.5 Bathrooms.

Convenient Amenities: Free WiFi, Washing Machine, Tumble Dryer, Dish Washer and Microwave Oven.

Lounge has Dartboard area, a separate Dining Room, Work Desk and a fully equipped Kitchen.

Enjoy a private garden and outdoor seating area.

Local Area: Within Easy reach of Fort Dunlop, StarCity, Villa Park, City Centre, Birmingham Airport & NEC are 30 minutes away.

The space
Large 5 Bedroom Contractor Crew House (Sleeps up to 9) with 2 Showers and a Bath. The Property is located on the fringe outskirts of Birmingham City Centre.
 
Minstead Houses is situated in the Erdington area of North Birmingham B24 and offers easy access to major ongoing infrastructure projects in Birmingham such as HS2.
 
The property includes a living room with 2 sofa beds and a fully equipped kitchen.

The property has free High Speed WiFi access throughout.
 
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can enjoy a garden and outdoor seating area.
 
The property has a work desk/table area in the Lounge and a Dartboard area.
 
Convenient Amenities Include: The holiday home provides off-street free parking for 2 vans on the long Driveway and extra free street parking is available on the road. For Laundry use there is a Washing Machine with Tumble Dryer, Iron with Ironing Board and a Dishwasher. Additional amenities include Smart TV in every room and free toiletries.
 
Local Attractions: Located 24 km from Birmingham Airport (BHX) & NEC approx. 20 minutes by car, Minstead Houses is near Star City (2.1 km), Villa Park (2.5 km), and Bullring Shopping Centre (5 km) is approx. 10 minutes by car. Drayton Manor Park, National Sea  Life Centre and Cadbury's World attract many visitors to the area.

Guest access
Access to the Property is via a Lockbox and the access code to the Lockbox for the key will be provided prior to arrival.

Other things to note
Please contact Host by email or text message for further questions.

title: Stylish House- B'ham Airport and NEC, Solihull
description:
Welcome to Aspen House by Snuz Living
Aspen House is a spacious 5-bedroom home in Solihull, sleeping up to 9 guests. Ideal for family stays, group bookings, corporate visits and contractor teams. With generous living spaces, a fully equipped kitchen and free parking, it delivers everything a hotel cannot — at a fraction of the cost. Perfectly located for the NEC, Birmingham Airport and Solihull town centre.

The space
The Space

Bright and generous, Aspen House offers everything your group needs to feel at home. The open plan kitchen and dining area is the heart of the property — ideal for shared meals and evenings together. Designed with both style and comfort in mind, it works just as well for a relaxed weekend as it does for a longer working stay.

Bedrooms

Five well presented bedrooms, each dressed in fresh crisp linen and available in super king or single configurations. Let us know your preference ahead of arrival. Comfortable and calm — designed for a proper night's sleep.

Bathrooms

Three bathrooms, each fitted with rain showers, a standard shower and a bathtub. Everything you need whether you are starting the day or winding down after it.

Kitchen & Dining

Fully equipped with a ceramic hob and oven, microwave, dishwasher, washing machine and dryer. A complimentary selection of teas is provided on arrival.

Amenities

Super-fast WiFi throughout
On-site parking for 3 cars or 2 vans
BT Sport and Netflix
Fully equipped kitchen with all appliances
Washing machine and dryer
Rain showers, bathtub and premium bathrooms
Hairdryer, fresh linen and towels provided
Complimentary toiletries — shampoo, body wash and body lotion

Location

Aspen House is well positioned for key destinations across the Midlands:

Birmingham Airport — minutes away for early departures and late arrivals
NEC Birmingham — ideal for exhibitors, event professionals and trade visitors
HS2 corridor — well located for contractors and project teams
Birmingham City Centre — a short drive for dining, shopping and entertainment
Major motorway links — M42, M6 and M40 all within 10 minutes

Perfect For

Families, friend groups, contractor teams, corporate travellers and NEC exhibitors. Aspen House offers home comforts at a fraction of the cost of a hotel. Discounts available for longer stays — contact Snuz Living directly for more information.

Cleanliness

Our professional cleaning team prepares the property to a high standard between every stay. You will always arrive to a fresh, well presented home.

Guest Policy

Only guests included in the reservation are permitted to stay at the property. Additional guests beyond the booked number will be subject to an extra charge — please ensure your booking reflects the correct number of guests in your party.

Guest access
🔑 Aspen House

Guests will have full access to the entire Aspen House, making it ideal for groups, families, contractors, and exhibitors.

You will be able to enjoy all areas of the property, including the open-plan kitchen and dining area, all bedrooms, bathrooms, and parking spaces.

There is parking on the drive for 3 cars or 2 vans and additional street parking available.

The code for the keys will be provided to you before your arrival, ensuring a smooth and convenient check-in process.

Other things to note
📌 Aspen House

-The bedrooms consist of flexible Superking/single bed arrangements. Please request your preferred setup in advance.
-The property is ideal for families, groups, contractors, and exhibitors visiting the area.
-There is onsite parking for 3 cars or 2 vans, with additional street parking available.
-Generous discounts are available for longer stays — please enquire for more details.
-Only guests included in the reservation are permitted to stay. Extra guests will be charged for.
-Booking terms and conditions apply and will be provided before check-in.
-A professional cleaning team maintains high standards of cleanliness and hygiene throughout the property.

title: Kula Birmingham - Superior 1 Bedroom Apt.
description:
A newly refurbished one-bedroom apartment in Queensgate, Birmingham city centre. Fully equipped kitchen, gorgeous bathroom, dedicated workspace and a fresh, modern interior. Part of a brand new building that opened in August 2024, with 67 apartments across seven floors, each finished to a consistent standard throughout.
Birmingham's best restaurants, bars, shopping and transport links are all within easy reach. A comfortable, well-equipped base.

The space
Queensgate is a new build recently opened in Aug 2024. The property has 67 units in the building and we offer variety of different apartment types.

Guest access
SELF CHECK-IN 24/7

You can check-in anytime after 03:00PM using our self check-in method.

Self check-in is available around the clock from 3pm. Before you arrive we will send a simple online check-in form asking for a copy of your valid government-issued ID and a signed contract and Deposit of £150. Once that is done you will receive all your arrival details including key retrieval instructions and directions to the apartment.


*DISCLAIMER*

We manage 67 apartments across this building. Every unit is finished to the same standard, though colour schemes vary floor to floor and the exact apartment may differ slightly from the photos depending on availability at check-in. You will always be in something that matches the quality and features shown in this listing.

Other things to note
Pets are welcome however there is also a £20 fee per pet, per night.

We have 24/7 support and you can message us at any time.

There is lift access to the apartment.

title: Stylish 2 Bedroom Apartment * Balcony * Fast Wi-Fi
description:
Stay in our stylish 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment with fast Wi-Fi, Netflix, a fully equipped kitchen, and free parking. Perfect for families, friends, or business travellers, the space offers comfort, privacy, and convenience. Enjoy a clean, modern layout designed for relaxation or remote work. Located close to shops, dining, and transport. Whether you're here for business or leisure, this is your ideal home away from home. Book now for a stress-free stay!

The space
The apartment comes fully furnished and thoughtfully equipped for both short and long-term stays. You’ll have access to:

High-speed Wi-Fi

Fresh bed linen and towels

Essential toiletries

50” Smart TV with Netflix

Juliet balcony for a breath of fresh air

Enjoy complete private access to the entire property during your stay — your comfort and convenience are our priority.

Please note: Parking is subject to availability and cannot be guaranteed.

If the keys and fob are not returned on the same day of your check out then there will be a charge of £200.

Prime Location – Hooper Street, B18
Just outside the city centre, the apartment is ideally situated in the vibrant B18 district, part of the historic Jewellery Quarter and close to the diverse neighbourhoods of Winson Green and Hockley. This area is full of character and offers the perfect blend of urban convenience and local charm.

Enjoy quick access to transport links, local shops, cafés, and green spaces — all within walking distance.

Guest access
Self Check-In Instructions

Arrival: Upon arrival, you will find a lockbox at the property.

Code: A unique lockbox code will be sent to you at 3:00 PM on the day of check-in. Please check your messages for this information.

Accessing the Keys: Enter the code into the lockbox to retrieve the keys. After removing the keys, please ensure the lockbox is securely closed.

Entering the Property: Use the keys to unlock the front door and make yourself comfortable.

Check-Out Instructions: At check-out, please return the keys to the lockbox and ensure it is securely locked.

If you have any questions or need assistance during your stay, please don’t hesitate to contact me.

Enjoy your stay!

Other things to note
I offer a wide range of properties to suit every need, from short getaways to long-term stays and group bookings. With hundreds of options across various locations, I can provide comfort, convenience, and flexibility for any occasion. Don’t hesitate to reach out for more details on long-term and group booking options! No parties and gatherings.

description:
Experience the perfect blend of modern comfort and historic charm in this stylish 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in the heart of Birmingham. One bathroom is en-suite, and the open-plan living area features a spacious lounge and a fully equipped kitchen, thoughtfully designed for both short and long stays.

The space
Relax with high-speed WiFi, Netflix, a 65” Smart TV, and comfy sofas, while fresh bed linen, towels, and toiletries ensure a hassle-free stay. The building offers lift access, an intercom system, and nearby paid street parking for convenience.

Located on Warstone Lane, you’ll be surrounded by trendy cafés, boutique shops, and cultural attractions, including St. Paul’s Square and the Jewellery Quarter Museum. With excellent transport links and easy access to Birmingham’s landmarks, entertainment, and dining, this apartment is ideal for leisure or business travellers seeking a central, vibrant, and comfortable base.

Guest access
You'll have full, private access to the apartment for the duration of your stay – no shared spaces. Enjoy the freedom to come and go as you please.

The key is stored inside the letterbox, which is secured with a code lock. You will receive the access code prior to your arrival. Upon check-in, simply enter the code to open the letterbox and retrieve the key. Please make sure to close it securely after use.

Other things to note
I offer a wide range of properties to suit every need, with hundreds of options available across various locations. Whether you're looking for a short getaway, a long-term stay, or need accommodation for a group, I can cater to all your requirements. The diverse selection ensures that I have the perfect space for your needs, providing comfort, convenience, and flexibility for any occasion. title: Luxury 1BR in The Octagon with City Views
description:
Elevated Urban Living at Birmingham’s Iconic Octagon
Experience refined city living at the brand new 'The Octagon Tower', Birmingham’s tallest and most iconic residential tower. This striking 49-storey landmark rises above the city skyline within the prestigious Paradise development.

Enjoy panoramic city views alongside a calm, modern interior designed for both comfort and style.

The space
Designed for both short and monthly stays, this apartment offers a seamless blend of comfort, convenience, and sophistication. We are more than just an Airbnb—guests benefit from a professionally managed experience, including 24-hour reception check-in and premium on-site services, offering more than simply a place to stay.

🏨 This is not just an Airbnb, we offer the fix of a hotel and a home with a front desk support!

Guest access
24/7 Guest Support 🕒📞🛎️

From booking to check-out, our dedicated team is available around the clock to ensure a smooth and worry-free experience, whether you need assistance, recommendations, or on-site support.

Building Amenities:
🏋️‍♂️ Fully equipped gym
🛋️ Resident lounge
💻Co-working spaces
🛎️Concierge services
✅ 24/7 Reception & On-Site Support
✅ Check-in directly at the building with our fully staffed front desk

Parking Details 🚗

Paid Parking at Paradise Parking (subject to availability)
Parking fees are the guest’s responsibility.

Reimbursable Parking Options:
We are happy to reimburse the cost for the following paid car parks. Please keep your receipt and send us a photo for reimbursement:

NCP Car Park – Newhall Street, Birmingham B3 1SW
Approx. 8-minute walk 🚶‍♂️ from the property

Q-Park – Brindley Place
Approx. 15-minute walk 🚶‍♀️ from the property

Other things to note
🔔 Important Notes Before Booking:
(Please Read Carefully)

UPON BOOKING:
✔️A valid passport or driver’s licence is required for all guests (hotel-style security requirement).
✔️The name on the ID must match the Airbnb account holder.
✔️Guests must sign our terms and conditions prior to check-in.

A £29 non-refundable damage waiver is required. This replaces a traditional deposit and covers accidental damage during your stay.
Check-In

We operate a meet-and-greet, in-person check-in at the building reception. A member of our team will meet you to hand over the keys.

Complimentary Essentials Pack (On Arrival) 🎁🛏️🧴
To help you settle in comfortably, we provide a complimentary starter essentials pack on arrival.

✨ Please note that there may be slight variations in the colour of the sofa, bedding, and bed frame. The apartment size, layout, and overall quality remain consistent. Some furnishings may vary as part of ongoing upgrades to enhance the guest experience.

Business & Long-Term Stays 💼🏢🛏️
We offer exclusive discounts for business travellers and long-term stays. Please contact us directly for tailored rates and monthly discounts.

title: Birmingham 4-Bed Home | Long Stays | Parking
description:
Lern Stays Present Autumn House a spacious four bedroom home in Birmingham, perfect for contractors, business travellers and families. Enjoy Smart TVs in every room, a fully equipped kitchen, large communal dining area, cosy living room, modern bathroom and downstairs toilet. With a garden, washing machine and dryer, plus driveway parking for two cars, it offers comfort and convenience close to transport links, the Jewellery Quarter and the city centre.

The space
Settle In and Enjoy a Warm, Welcoming Retreat – Welcome to Autumn House 🏡

Tucked away in a well connected part of Birmingham, Autumn House is a spacious four bedroom home designed for comfort, convenience and longer stays. With excellent access to transport links and only minutes from the Jewellery Quarter and Birmingham City Centre, it is the perfect base for contractors, business travellers, families and groups wanting space to unwind and recharge.

Step inside and you are greeted by a beautifully arranged home built for both relaxation and togetherness. The large communal dining area sits at the heart of the house, offering the perfect place to gather, enjoy meals or catch up after a long day. The fully equipped kitchen has everything you need, from modern appliances to cookware and an air fryer, making self catering simple and enjoyable whether you are preparing breakfast or cooking an evening meal.

After a busy day in the city, head into the cosy living room where comfortable seating and a Smart TV create the ideal setting for movie nights or quiet downtime. Every bedroom is designed with comfort in mind, featuring Smart TVs, soft bedding and a peaceful atmosphere that guarantees a great night's sleep. The layout suits colleagues sharing, families needing room to settle in or groups travelling together. Each room has a lock for privacy.

For longer stays, Autumn House has everything you need to feel at home, including a washing machine and dryer that bring complete convenience to your stay. The property also benefits from a modern family bathroom, along with a downstairs toilet for added ease.

Step outside to the private garden, a lovely space to enjoy fresh air, morning coffee or a quiet moment in the evening. With driveway parking for two cars, it is especially suitable for contractors or guests travelling with vehicles.

Local restaurants, shops and amenities are just a short walk or quick drive away, while Birmingham’s major destinations are easily accessible. With its blend of comfort, space and excellent connectivity, Autumn House offers everything you need to feel settled and relaxed.

Whether your visit is short or extended, Autumn House welcomes you with warmth, practicality and style, giving you the perfect place to recharge and enjoy Birmingham at your own pace.

Guest access
Guests have full access to the entire property, including:

All 4 bedrooms

Fully equipped kitchen & dining area

Living room with Smart TV & Netflix

Private garden

Driveway parking for 2 vehicles

Other things to note
A pre-authorisation of £300 is required for your booking.
This is not a payment and will be held against your card until the property is inspected after checkout. You will normally see this reflected in your account within 3-5 days after inspection.

Welcome to Cozy Homes Property - Solihull.
Ideal for Contractors, Professionals & Families ✨

This modern, spacious 3-bedroom home is set in a quiet residential area of Shirley and offers the perfect balance of comfort, space, and convenience for up to 5 guests. Whether you’re working locally or visiting with family, the home is well suited for both short and extended stays.

Sleeping Arrangements 🛏️

Bedroom 1: Double bed

Bedroom 2: 2 x Single beds ( can be joined to make super king bed upon request)

Bedroom 3: Small double bed

All bedrooms feature brand new comfy beds, fresh linens, and storage for clothing and luggage to ensure a restful night’s sleep.

Living & Dining 🛋️

Relax in the bright and welcoming living area with comfortable seating, a Smart TV, and fast WiFi throughout the property. It’s equally suited for unwinding in the evening or working remotely during the day.

The fully equipped kitchen is ideal for longer stays and includes an airfryer, oven, hob, microwave, fridge/freezer, washing machine, air fryer and all essential cookware and utensils. Complimentary tea and coffee are provided so you can settle in straight away.

Bathroom 🛁

The home benefits from a clean, modern family bathroom. Fresh towels and complimentary toiletries (shampoo, conditioner, body wash, and hand soap) are provided for your stay.

Outdoor Space 🌿

Enjoy a private rear garden, perfect for a breath of fresh air or relaxing after a long day.

Parking 🚗

Driveway parking for 1 vehicle

Additional street parking available nearby in a quiet residential area if required

Location 📍

Conveniently located with excellent access to key destinations:

Sears Retail Park – 4 mins by car

Solihull Town Centre – 10 mins by car

Birmingham Airport & NEC – 15 mins by car

Lock box

🚫 Please note: no parties, no smoking, and no pets allowed. 🚫

👉 A fantastic alternative to hotels, this home offers the flexibility of a fully equipped house, with the comfort and space to cook, work, and unwind at your own pace.

Cozy Homes Property look forward to welcoming you soon 😊

title: Tudor Lodge with high ceilings in Moseley
description:
Very private and secure house and garden in an upmarket gated development.One of Birmingham s smartest areas Moseley. superfast WiFi and Netflix is provided . A separate office gives extra privacy to remote home workers The house has a small private woodland style patio garden area immediately beside the property,plus a pretty larger communal park style space ,with gazebo and benches for guests to play with children or a dog, picnic or read etc. The larger area can be used by other guests.

The space
A stunning original Tudor Lodge complete with black and white facade and lovely high ceilings. The property has gated electronic entrance for your security and it's own private parking directly beside its own front door. Set in the conservation area of trendy and cosmopolitan Moseley village. Full of cafe culture, shops and restaurants and the famous leafy parks . A lovely historic area full of Edwardian and Victorian villas with grand architecture. Moseley has long been a sought after area in which to live by professionals, academics ,celebrities and artists. It has something for everyone and is just a short 10 minute drive to the heart of Birmingham. Tudor Lodge is an original old building with bags of personality and character. Old on the outside but modern on the inside. It has its own small private woodland style patio garden which is private and fenced with patio table and chairs. Entrance to the patio area is not direct from the house. Guests need to who out of the front doors and walk a short distance, to access the gate to the private house garden.
A separate larger communal garden with grass and seating areas is also available to guests .

Guest access
Just a few minutes walk to the shops ,cafes, parks and restaurants of the centre of stunning Moseley village. One of Birmingham's most vibrant and Popular areas.
City centre is now only a 10 minute train ride away on the new direct train line.
Entrance to the house itself is by large private front door from a flat parking area. There is a lock box provided.

Other things to note
Requests for pets must me made to the host and are not guaranteed . Pet stays are at additional cost and on a case by case basis. To pay for additional cleaning, if a pet stay is agreed in advance by the host, the guest is charged 5 pounds per pet per night . This is paid locally to the host on arrival. Pets are not allowed on beds and sofas. Toileting of any dog cannot be made in the small woodland patio garden beside the house.

host_about:
Well travelled, having lived in several countries, and vacationed in many  others countries.  
 I lived for 9 years in Hong Kong, Cyprus , Spain, India and the Greek islands and love the colour and contrast of other cultures ,scenery, wildlife, nature and foods. I love to host and meet new people. Love to try food from other countries .
I am a passionate lover of wildlife, nature and conservation and have travelled extensively to see some of the world's finest creatures in their natural environments. Many more destinations in the world yet to experience. The tick list is far from complete as there is so much more to see and do. New continents yet to discover and experiences to have. 
My knowledge of the UK and it's many sights and scenery is extensive, and I am happy to help those who would like to see as much of our beautiful country as possible.

title: Spacious 5 Bedroom House*Sleeps 11*Parking*Garden
description:
This spacious 5-bedroom, 2-bathroom house comfortably sleeps up to 11 guests with 11 single beds, making it ideal for contractors, groups, and long stays. The home is fully furnished and well-equipped for both short and extended visits, offering fast Wi-Fi, a functional kitchen, and comfortable communal areas. Conveniently located on Coleshill Road with easy access to Birmingham city centre, NEC, and Birmingham Airport.

The space
This spacious five-bedroom house is ideal for groups or long stays, comfortably accommodating up to 11 guests. It features hotel-quality linens, fresh towels, toiletries, high-speed WiFi, a 50” Smart TV, and a cosy living room with a large sofa.

Bright interiors and large windows create a warm, inviting atmosphere—perfect for guests who prefer houses over apartments. The fully equipped kitchen is ideal for home cooking.

Guests can also enjoy off-street parking for up to four cars and a lovely garden for outdoor relaxation.

Guest access
Self Check-In Instructions

Arrival: Upon arrival, you will find a lockbox at the property.

Code: A unique lockbox code will be sent to you at 3:00 PM on the day of check-in. Please check your messages for this information.

Accessing the Keys: Enter the code into the lockbox to retrieve the keys. After removing the keys, please ensure the lockbox is securely closed.

Entering the Property: Use the keys to unlock the front door and make yourself comfortable.

Check-Out Instructions: At check-out, please return the keys to the lockbox and ensure it is securely locked.

If you have any questions or need assistance during your stay, please don’t hesitate to contact me.

Enjoy your stay!

Other things to note
No security deposit required. No parties or gatherings.

title: Spacious First Floor Flat, free parking, near NEC
description:
The flat is spacious and bright, with contemporary decor.

The Master Bedroom is huge, with a double bed, and accent chair. The second bedroom a good size, with a double bed.
The extra large lounge has 3 Sofa's, one of which is a small double sofa bed!

The kitchen is fully fitted with standard sized appliances. Bathroom and toilet are separate rooms which helps avoid queues for the loo!

Our Carpets have just been replaced and are brand new! Please remove shoes.

The space
Our Charming Flat is above a Grade 2 listed old pub, that use to be known as the Dog & Partridge Pub, built in 1929. Large flat windows overlook the beer gardens & neighbouring horse paddock.

The pub was converted to a church over 15 year ago (which still holds services on Sunday mornings and occasional evenings), but the flat above is totally self contained with access from the car-park. Guests get free parking in our private car park for up to 2 cars, and will access the flat through the garden gate. Please note that as this is a 1st floor flat, there are several sets of stairs to get you from the car-park to the flat.

All Bed-linens, pillows & duvets are new this year.
All kitchen appliances including Fridge, Freezer, Oven, Hob, Microwave, Pots & Pans, Kettle, Filter Coffee Maker, & Toaster are available to use.

TV has freeview channels & Amazon Fire Stick, and is equipped with Netflix etc. :)

Guest access
We are right next door to two take-aways, Chinese & Indian, with a Fish & Chip shop around the corner. There is a shop a 5 minute walk away, and a McDonalds within a mile. A five minute drive from the local high-street.

Guests will pass through garden and up onto back terrace, which is available for guest sitting. No BBQ-ing.

Other things to note
Garden gate door and flat door must always be closed and locked after guests go through them.

title: 5 Doubles LWB Drive Nr Edgbaston Solihull Digbeth
description:
Spacious house with large driveway parking - which fits LWBS X2 - situated in the leafy suburbs of Moseley.

5 Double beds, 1 single.


📞✉️ Additional Photos - National 🏠 🏡 Inquiries, Work Bookings, Insurance Relocations.

Perfect base for Edgbaston, Kings Heath, Birmingham City centre, A45, Solihull, M42, Airport, HS2 Sites and more!

Birmingham City Centre - 10 Min
Coach Station - 10 Min
NEC/BHX/JLR/Arden Cross Site - 15Min
Solihull Centre - 15 Min
HS2 Sites - 10 to 20 min
M42 20 min

The space
Located on a private cul-de-sac

Parking: Large driveway for 3-4 vehicles or 2 LWB vans.
Great off-street parking in addition

Downstairs: Spaciously equipped kitchen overlooking the beautiful garden.
Living room, with stunning fireplace features, 2 downstairs bedrooms, and a few extra touches :)

Upstairs: 3 Bedrooms. Spacious. Large fitted wardrobes generous sleeping room.
Bathroom

Beds - All beds except for 1 are doubles, with brand new orthopaedic mattresses

Downstairs:

Living room - 2 generously roomy sofas, dining table for 4-6, coffee tables, large 50 inch TV, beautifully decorated and a brilliant space.

Kitchen - Very well equipped (see photos). large pots pans, non-stick frying pans, real cookware, ample dinnerware. mugs, wine glasses

Brand new large range cooker & a new American fridge freezer, washing machine and integrated dishwasher. Microwave, toaster, kettle etc

We also provide: Tea, Coffee, Sugar. Herbal teas. Cooking oils and basic spices.

2 Bedrooms -

Front Bedroom: 1 Double Bed, multi purpose games table, a small seating area.
1 Extra Bedroom in the newly carpetted garage room - This is also a large comfortable double bed, a work desk - located next to the kitchen.

Upstairs:

Bedroom 1 - 1 Double Bed, 1 single bed - Large fitted wardrobes - Spacious room, overlooking the back garden. Curtains for privacy
Bedroom 2 - 1 Double Bed, Large fitted wardrobes - This overlooks the front private street
Bedroom 3 - 1 Double Bed - Again, overlooking the front driveway

Bathroom: Shower WC, bath, sink, mirror etc. Supply towels, shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, cleaning products.

We also supply: cleaning products. dishwasher pods, washing machine pods, mop, hoover, etc for short term and long-term guests.

Hairdryer iron, ironing board, clothes drying rack.

Guest access
Whole House

Other things to note
Quiet hours: 10pm to 7am
Shoes Off Indoors
Please clean, tidy, wash up etc just like you would at home..

Discretionary to us, should our rules be breached, we can involve security and police.

Please only utilise our driveway and the parking in front of this without blocking neighbours driveways.

Please respect the premises, shoes off indoors, no make-up on white towels, please dispose of your rubbish in the relevant bins, recycling separate etc.

Deposits of £350 required before check-in details plus photographic ID.

No Parties (Fine of £500)
No Pets (Fine of £500)
No indoor Smoking or recreational drugs, Cannabis etc (£500 fine).
No Unbooked guests (Fine of £500)

title: 1BD | City Centre Gem | Netflix | Sleeps 4 | Wi-Fi
description:
Stay in the heart of Birmingham! 🏙️ This stylish 1BR flat is your perfect city hub, sleeping 4 with a cozy bedroom and quality sofa bed. 🛋️

Location Highlights:
• 📍 3-min walk: Utilita Arena (NIA)
• 🛍️ Stroll away: Bullring & City Centre
• 🎤 Ideal for: Concerts, shopping, or business
Top Perks:
• 🍳 Full Kitchen & Modern Living
• 🎬 Netflix + Fast WiFi 📶
• 🔑 Self Check-in
• 🚗 Nearby Parking

✨ Clean, central & modern—the perfect urban retreat. Book your stay now! ✨

The space
This stylish one-bedroom apartment at 150 Sand Pits is the ultimate urban base for anyone looking to dive into the best of Birmingham. Perfectly blending modern convenience with a prime location, the space is designed to cater to both short-term event-goers and long-term city explorers.

The Space
The flat features a bright, open-plan living area with a contemporary aesthetic. It comfortably accommodates up to four guests, thanks to a cozy master bedroom and a high-quality sofa bed in the lounge. Whether you're relaxing with Netflix on the high-speed WiFi or prepping a meal in the fully equipped kitchen, the apartment provides a true "home away from home" feel.

The Location
You couldn't be better placed for entertainment and convenience:

• Events: A literal 3-minute walk to the Utilita Arena (NIA), making it ideal for concert-goers.

• Shopping & Culture: A short, scenic stroll takes you to the Bullring, Grand Central, and the vibrant canals of Brindleyplace.

• Ease of Access: With self check-in and nearby parking, your arrival and departure are completely stress-free.

Whether you're here for a high-energy concert, a shopping spree, or a business trip, this flat offers a clean, quiet, and central sanctuary in the heart of the city.

Guest access
Your Private City Sanctuary 🔑

Guests have exclusive, full access to the entire apartment. You won’t be sharing the space with anyone else, so you can truly make yourself at home. This includes:

• The Living Area: A stylish, open-plan space for relaxing, dining, or catching up on your favorite shows.

• The Kitchen: Fully equipped for your use—perfect for brewing a morning coffee or whipping up a midnight snack.

• The Bedroom: A private, cozy retreat featuring a comfortable bed and fresh linens.

• The Bathroom: Modern and clean, stocked with essential toiletries and fresh towels for your arrival.

Building & Access 🏢
• Self Check-in: Enjoy the freedom to arrive at your convenience using our secure self-check-in system.

• Building Entrance: Access to the main building is via a secure fob/code system, ensuring a safe environment throughout your stay.

Note: While we don't have on-site parking within the building gates, there are several secure public parking options just a stone's throw away!

title: Polly Cottage
description:
Located in Knowle next to Grimshaw Hall which was built in 1560 with private views overlooking the lake, down a private road with car park and a separate private entrance. Our cosy cottage sits within the grounds of our home, which used to form part of the Grimshaw Hall estate. It has secluded private views with use of its own garden area with table and chairs on a private decking area. We are located 10 mins from the NEC and airport, 3 mins from J5 M42. The Grand Union Canal runs to the rear.

The space
Heated with economy electric radiators its cosy in the colder months, relaxing with outside space in the warmer months.

Guest access
Garden areas:
You have your own garden area to the rear of the cottage including the decking and the area in front of the Games room. The games room will be locked and out of bounds.
Please do not use the garden at the rear of the cottage, this belongs to the main house. Please respect our privacy as we shall respect yours.
Access – We may require access to the garden areas, games room and sheds from time to time, please don’t be alarmed.

Other things to note
Parking is shared with my neighbours so we like to keep everybody happy, if you can make your journey in one car, that will help, although there is parking for two cars.

Please note, for guests with a van, please contact us in advance to discuss, but as a rule of thumb small to medium sized vans only.
There are some lovely walks straight from the cottage. There is a nice short walk down the canal and into knowle village, or walk further down to Knowle Hall lochs keeping an eye peeled for kingfishers and herons..

Each apartment includes free private parking, fast Wi-Fi, a fully equipped kitchen, dish washer, washing machine, smart TV with streaming, comfortable living space and either a balcony/canal view or private garden access depending on availability

The space
Located in Oldbury, the apartments offer a quiet and convenient base with easy access to Birmingham city centre, the M5, Langley Green Station, Sandwell Aquatics Centre, West Bromwich, Smethwick and local business areas. Guests regularly praise the apartments for being clean, modern, well-equipped, comfortable and easy to access.

A convenient base for guests visiting or working near Midland Metropolitan University Hospital, Smethwick, Oldbury and West Birmingham.

Ideal for guests looking for:
✔️ Birmingham apartment with free parking

title: -Birmingham Central DeLuxe Inn-
description:
If you're looking for luxury hotel experience, with the pleasures of a home from home environment, then look no further! We promise all that, as-well as excellent transportation links and a prime location; just 5 to 10 minutes from the Birmingham city centre , 25 minutes from Birmingham Airport and M42/M6 and 20 minutes from NEC.
You can switch off from the minute you walk in through the door, knowing that the house will provide you with a premium stay.

The space
The house was professionally interior designed just 1 month ago especially for the Airbnb market. We are proud to offer you a stylish and contemporary property for your stay, where you can expect luxury throughout.

Perfect for exhibitors/visitors to the NEC, Birmingham Airport, friends meeting up, staycations and family breaks to Birmingham and the West Midlands.

All the rooms have been carefully and thoughtfully designed, aimed at giving you a wonderful stay. We have taken care of every detail - fine Egyptian cotton bed linen with sumptuous pillows and duvets and blackout blinds - all to ensure you have a peaceful night sleep.

The house boasts a brand new fully-equipped fitted kitchen with breakfast bar for casual dining. The cupboards are full of everything you might need from pots and pans, cutlery, crockery and dinner ware. Appliances include: electric hob, microwave, toaster, kettle, oven, dishwasher, washing-machine, tumble dryer and fridge-freezer. Everything you need for a home from home experience.

We provide towels, hair dryer iron and ironing board, tea, coffee, white and brown sugar and condiments are provided.

In the lounge you'll find a huge 65 inch Ultra HD smart television for you to enjoy, and fast WiFi is provided.

You'll be able to relax and unwind in the private patio which is amazing ,

Entrance to the house is via a key lock door , There's parking on the drive for 3 cars, with free on street parking available for additional cars.

There's a great range of shops within walking distance to the house, including multiple supermarkets, local coffee shops, restaurants, takeaways,. A short 5 minute drives (or 15 minute walk) takes you to a giant 24h Tesco superstore, and Gym.

Guest access
Your booking is for the entire property which can sleep up to 16 people in 4 bedrooms and in the lounge . Booking this house means you will have it all to yourself, so you will only be staying with the people on your reservation.

The house is ideally located to serve as a base for anyone who is working in or around Birmingham or simply visiting the area, 25 minute drive to Birmingham International Airport, the NEC, Jaguar Land Rover and Resorts World. Birmingham City Centre is just 5 to 10 minute drive from the house where you'll find the amazing Bullring Shopping Centre, Brindley Place with beautiful bars and restaurants, Grand Central, Mailbox and the National Indoor Arena. There are a wide range of attractions and surrounding historical towns and villages, including Stratford Upon Avon, The Cotswolds, Warwick, Peak District and Drayton Manor Park, all easily accessed from the house.

Other things to note
Other things to note
The front outside and backyard is monitored by a security camera 24/7 To ensure transparency and adherence to Airbnb rules the camera monitors how many guests arrive to the house. The only people allowed to stay and enter at the house are those booked on the reservation as we don't allow any visitors in the property .

title: Cutlass Nest | Cozy City Centre Stay | Parking
description:
A cosy 1 bedroom apartment centrally located off Broad St
* Sleeps 3 w/ 1 Double Bed & 1 Double Sofa Bed
* Smart TV with Netflix/On-demand
* 3 mins to Mailbox/Brindley Place
* 10 mins to Bullring/Grand Plaza/New St Station
* Walk to Barclaycard Arena
* Walk Symphony Hall/ICC/NIA
* 24 mins to Birmingham Airport/NEC
Plenty of restaurants and bars in the area. Perfect for families visiting and groups wishing to have a great night out.

The space
This cosy 1-bedroom apartment off Broad Street is perfectly located for exploring Birmingham. It comfortably sleeps 3 with a double bed and a double sofa bed, and features a Smart TV with Netflix and on-demand entertainment.

Just 3 minutes from the Mailbox and Brindleyplace, and 10 minutes’ walk to Bullring, Grand Central, and New Street Station, it’s an ideal base for sightseeing or city shopping. The apartment is also within walking distance of Barclaycard Arena, Symphony Hall, ICC, and NIA, with Birmingham Airport and the NEC just 24 minutes away.

With plenty of restaurants, bars, and nightlife nearby, it’s perfect for families, groups, or anyone looking to enjoy the city.

Guest access
Guests have full and exclusive access to the entire apartment, including the bedroom, bathroom, living area, and kitchen. The space is designed for comfort and convenience, with a cosy sleeping area, Smart TV, and all the amenities you need for a relaxing stay.

You’re free to enjoy the apartment and its facilities at your leisure, whether you’re unwinding after a day exploring the city or planning a night out in Birmingham.

Other things to note
To help ensure a smooth and enjoyable stay for everyone, please keep the following in mind:

- Guests are required to complete a short check-in form and provide valid photo ID before arrival.

- The lead guest must be at least 23 years old.

- A refundable £150 security deposit is required. This may be waived for guests with strong, positive reviews.

- Please ensure all guests are included in your booking. Any additional visitors must be agreed in advance (additional charges may apply).

- We ask that guests respect the property and neighbours—no excessive noise or disruptive behaviour.

- Events, parties, or gatherings must be discussed and approved prior to booking.

- Late check-outs without prior approval may incur additional charges.

Full details can be found in our house rules. If you have any questions before booking, feel free to get in touch—we’re happy to help!

Situated in the heart of Moseley, the area combines urban convenience with a relaxed, bohemian vibe. Independent cafés, boutiques, and local shops are nearby, alongside a lively arts scene with galleries, live music, and street festivals.

title: Stylish 3 Bed House * Netflix * Parking * Garden
description:
Welcome to this modern 3-bedroom, 1-bath apartment in the peaceful Castle Vale area of Birmingham. Perfect for families, professionals, or weekend getaways, the home features free Wi-Fi, a fully equipped kitchen, and private parking. Enjoy a cozy living space with stylish décor and all essentials for a relaxing stay. Ideally located just minutes from Birmingham Airport, NEC, and the city centre, with easy access to local shops, cafes, and transport links ideal for your next Airbnb stay.

The space
Experience comfort and convenience in this stylish 3-bedroom home in Birmingham. The property features a fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances, a cozy living area with Netflix and super-fast Wi-Fi, and a bright, spotless bathroom. Fresh bed linen, towels, and toiletries are provided for your stay. Peaceful bedrooms ensure a restful night’s sleep. Ideal for professionals, couples, families, or small groups, this home offers the perfect balance of city convenience and relaxing comfort.

Guest access
Self Check-In Instructions:

Arrival: Upon arrival, you’ll find a lockbox with the details given to you.

Code: You will receive a unique lockbox code at 3 PM on the day of check-in. Please make sure to check your messages for the code.

Unlocking the Lockbox: Enter the code on the lockbox to retrieve the keys. After taking the keys, please ensure the lockbox is securely closed.

Entering the Property: Use the keys to access the front door. Once inside, feel free to make yourself comfortable.

Check-Out Instructions: When checking out, simply return the keys to the lockbox and ensure it is locked.

If you have any questions or need assistance during your stay, don’t hesitate to reach out.

Enjoy your stay!

Other things to note
I offer a wide range of properties to suit every need, with hundreds of options available across various locations. Whether you're looking for a short getaway, a long-term stay, or need accommodation for a group, I can cater to all your requirements. The diverse selection ensures that I have the perfect space for your needs, providing comfort, convenience, and flexibility for any occasion. Don’t hesitate to reach out for more details on long-term and group booking options!
During your stay:

1. There cannot be any more than the confirmed guests in or on our property at any one point, this will be a violation of our occupancy limit and violation of this will lead to the immediate removal of all guests without any refund.

2. All guests must respect our community guidelines:

No Parties/Gatherings that exceed the maximum number of guests
No Smoking
No extra guests

3, Please respect the neighbours and keep the noise down after 10 pm.

4. We would prefer if you could:

Use indoor shoes/slippers
Treat the flat as if it were your own
When leaving the property please make sure you lock the door and all the windows

5. This is a self-check-in property, by booking this property you certify that you are willing and able to follow the instructions that you have been provided by Air BnB through the house manual or the host check-in document sent to your email. You also agree that you will not contact Air BnB and host before reading your house manual and key instruction documents sent to you by Air BnB or by the Host.

6. There will be a fine of £50 for smoking, this will be applied for each day of your booking.

7. Check out is strictly at 11 am, a charge will be applied for any unauthorised late checkouts.

8. You are responsible for any damages caused upon your stay by not following house rules. You are also responsible if the damages cause any upcoming guest an inconvenience. You will be liable for any refunds given to any guests due to any negative experienced caused by your damages.

9. You must pass our verification process. Failure to do so will result in us declining your booking.

10. You agree that your booking this property in goodwill with your host and you will not attempt to damage your hosts business if you lose a dispute.

title: The Aurelia Suite
description:
Welcome to the Aurelia Suite, a refined and spacious retreat designed with contemporary elegance and soothing neutral tones. Blending soft beige, warm wood finishes, and subtle textures, this suite offers a calm and sophisticated atmosphere—perfect for both relaxation and extended stays.

The space
Located on the first floor, the suite is positioned on the road side, yet benefits from a quiet setting. The triple-glazed windows provide excellent sound insulation, ensuring a peaceful and undisturbed stay.



At the center of the room is a luxurious king-size bed, dressed in premium linens and layered cushions, inviting you to unwind in complete comfort. Natural light pours in through the bay window, framed with full-length curtains, enhancing the airy and tranquil feel of the space.



By the window, a cozy two-seat arrangement creates the perfect spot to relax—ideal for enjoying a morning coffee, reading, or simply soaking in the natural light.



The suite features a beautifully designed media wall with integrated ambient lighting, creating a warm focal point for relaxing evenings. A sleek counter space, paired with a mirror and wall lighting, serves perfectly as both a dedicated workspace or a stylish dressing table, offering flexibility for your stay.



Thoughtfully equipped with modern amenities, the Aurelia Suite includes a Smart TV with Netflix & YouTube (guests can log in with their own accounts), fridge, kettle, generous wardrobe space, and a secure in-room safe—ensuring a seamless and comfortable experience.



The contemporary en-suite bathroom, matching the same high standard, features a sleek walk-in shower and modern finishes for a refreshing and relaxing experience.



Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or enjoying a peaceful morning by the window, the Aurelia Suite offers the perfect blend of space, style, and comfort.

Guest access
To ensure a seamless and stress-free arrival, please confirm the correct number of guests prior to check-in.



The property offers convenient private driveway parking directly in front of the home. Should this space already be occupied, there is unrestricted on-street parking available nearby.



Access to the property is simple and secure via key card entry, which will be provided upon check-in, allowing you to enter and exit the property with ease throughout your stay.



For your peace of mind, CCTV is in operation covering all external areas of the property.



Please note: there are a couple of small steps from street level leading to the front entrance.

Other things to note
Strictly no parties or events

Any anti-social behaviour will result in immediate termination of your stay without refund

No smoking or vaping inside the property

External security cameras are in operation to ensure safety


Getting Around


Getting around from Moseley Luxury Stay is exceptionally easy and convenient.



The property is ideally located just a 6-minute walk from the nearest train station, providing fast and direct access to Birmingham city centre and major destinations.



Local buses also run frequently, making travel across the city simple and reliable.



For those who enjoy walking, Moseley is wonderfully pedestrian-friendly, with cafés, parks, and shops all within easy reach—including M&S just a short 6-minute stroll away.



Cyclists can take advantage of scenic routes such as the Cannon Hill Park cycle paths, while drivers benefit from quick access to major roads including the A38 and A435. Taxis and ride-hailing services are also readily available.



Whether travelling for business or leisure, you’ll find getting around both effortless and enjoyable.
