title: Emirates 5BR, 3BR Family & Contractor Stay NEC
description:
Enjoy a spacious and modern stay in this elegant 5-bedroom, 3-bathroom home in Birmingham, perfectly located near NEC, Birmingham Airport, and major transport links. Designed for comfort, space, and convenience, this property is ideal for families, contractors, and business travellers.

The space
This bright and stylish home offering generous living areas designed for relaxation and group comfort. The open-plan layout creates a welcoming space to unwind, dine, and enjoy time together after a busy day.

The fully equipped kitchen makes home cooking effortless, while the five well-appointed bedrooms provide comfort and privacy with quality linens and ample storage. With three modern bathrooms, the home easily accommodates larger groups staying together.

Key Features:
• Spacious 5-bedroom, 3-bathroom modern home
• Stylish open-plan living and dining area
• Fully equipped kitchen with modern appliances
• Smart TV and high-speed WiFi throughout
• Free on-site parking
• Private outdoor dining area
• Excellent access to NEC, Birmingham Airport & Resorts World
• Ideal for contractors, families, and group stays

Perfectly positioned in a well-connected residential area, this home offers a seamless blend of comfort, practicality, and convenience for both short and extended stays in Birmingham.

Guest access
Guests at Emirates House can enjoy a seamless self-check-in process, ensuring both convenience and safety throughout their stay.

The property is secured within private gates, granting access to only five exclusive residences—one of which is Emirates House. Nestled in Solihull, one of Birmingham’s most prestigious areas, this prime location offers a perfect blend of luxury, exclusivity, and security for a truly exceptional stay.

Other things to note
HOUSE RULES & GUESTS EXPECTATIONS
To ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay for all guests, we kindly ask that you follow these house rules:

🚫 No Parties or Gatherings – This property is for registered guests only. Unauthorized events are strictly prohibited.

🚭 No Smoking or Vaping Indoors – Smoking and vaping are strictly prohibited inside the property. Please use the designated smoking area if needed.

🐾 Pets Allowed Upon Approval – There will be £50 per pet, and we will require a damage deposit of £100 (less than 20lbs). Note, that only dogs are allowed.

🔇 Respect Quiet Hours – Please keep noise levels to a minimum, especially during nighttime hours, to ensure a peaceful environment for everyone.

🏡 Respect the Property – Treat the home with care and report any damages or maintenance issues to the host immediately.

🚫 No Illegal Substances – The use of any illegal substances is strictly forbidden on the property.

👥 Guests & Visitors – Only registered guests are allowed on the property. Visitors are not permitted unless approved by the host in advance.

🧹 Maintain Cleanliness – Please keep the property clean and tidy during your stay. Excessive cleaning required after check-out may result in additional fees.

🤝 To help maintain our property in great condition, a security deposit of £350 is collected prior to check-in. This deposit is fully refundable after your stay if no damage or extra cleaning is needed.

We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to hosting you!

title: 20% off | City Stay | 6 Bed |Gym, Co-Work, Skyline
description:
Modern shared city living in central Birmingham, designed for professionals who value workspace, connectivity and location.

This 6-bedroom apartment is part of Valore Living by Valore Property Services, our modern, affordable city-living collection offering high-quality accommodation with exceptional shared amenities.

Ideal for contractors, corporate teams, relocations and longer stays.

The space
This is a 6-bedroom shared apartment designed to deliver modern, affordable accommodation supported by outstanding communal facilities.

Inside the apartment you will find:
- 6 private bedrooms, each designed for comfort and functionality

- A shared open-plan kitchen and lounge area with seating and TV

- Fully equipped shared kitchen suitable for everyday cooking (we do not supply oil/salt & pepper)

- Dining and social space for residents

- Clean, modern design with natural light throughout

Inside your private bedroom:

- A small double bed, suitable for one adult or a cosy stay for two

- Storage space for personal belongings

- Dedicated workspace and high-speed Wi-Fi

- Access to shared bathroom facilities within the apartment

This setup is ideal for professionals seeking a balance between privacy in their room and shared living in well-managed communal spaces.

Guest access
Guests have access to:

Their private bedroom within the 6-bedroom apartment

Shared kitchen and lounge area within the apartment

All communal building facilities, including co-working spaces, gym, cinema room, games room, karaoke room and laundry facilities

Please note that communal areas within the apartment and building are shared with other residents.

Other things to note
This listing is part of Valore Living by Valore Property Services and is offered as a modern, affordable accommodation option designed around shared living and premium communal amenities rather than private luxury extras.

To ensure expectations are clear:
- This is a shared 6-bedroom apartment

- Bedrooms are private; kitchen and lounge areas are shared

- The bed in each room is a small double

- Communal areas are shared with other residents

- No on-site parking is available

In return, guests benefit from access to professional co-working spaces, high-speed Wi-Fi, gym, cinema room, games room, karaoke room and laundry facilities, offering excellent value for longer and work-related stays.

Multiple units available

This building contains multiple apartments and rooms. We welcome group bookings, contractor teams, corporate projects, relocations and insurance stays.

Discounted rates are available for longer stays or multiple rooms.
Please message us before booking if you require more than one room.

House Rules & Policies

- Check-in: 3:00 PM | Check-out: 10:00 AM

- No parties or loud music. A £250 fee will be charged for disturbances

- No smoking anywhere in the building. A fine of up to £1,000 may apply

- £100 fee for lost keys or fobs

- All guests must be declared before check-in via a secure Airbnb link

- CCTV operates in communal areas only for the safety of residents and guests

- The property is professionally managed, maintained and cleaned before every stay

- Quiet hours apply. This is a professionally managed residential building

- An optional damage waiver may be offered prior to arrival through our secure guest portal. This is entirely optional and does not affect your booking.

Management & Hosting

Managed by Valore Property Services, trusted short-let specialists delivering professionally managed accommodation across the UK.

Questions or special requirements? Message us anytime, we are here to help.

Important Guest Information

Please note that all guests are required to provide the names of everyone staying and photo ID for the lead guest before check-in.

This will be requested via a secure link through Airbnb messaging and is required for security and insurance purposes only.

Well travelled, having lived in several countries, and vacationed in many  others countries.  
 I lived for 9 years in Hong Kong, Cyprus , Spain, India and the Greek islands and love the colour and contrast of other cultures ,scenery, wildlife, nature and foods. I love to host and meet new people. Love to try food from other countries .

Many more destinations in the world yet to experience. The tick list is far from complete as there is so much more to see and do. New continents yet to discover and experiences to have. 
My knowledge of the UK and it's many sights and scenery is extensive, and I am happy to help those who would like to see as much of our beautiful country as possible.

The space
This is a spacious 3-bedroom house set up for comfortable short and medium-term stays.

The property sleeps up to 7 guests.

Bedroom 1 has 2 single beds.
Bedroom 2 has 2 zip-and-link single beds, which can be kept as singles or joined together as a king-size bed on request.

The living room has 2 sofa beds, best suited as large single sleeping spaces.

This is a residential area, so please respect the neighbours and keep noise to a minimum, especially between 10pm and 8am.

The sofa beds are best suited as large single sleeping spaces.

Arrival: Upon arrival, you will find a lockbox at the property.

Accessing the Keys: Enter the code into the lockbox to retrieve the keys. After removing the keys, please ensure the lockbox is securely closed.

Entering the Property: Use the keys to unlock the front door and make yourself comfortable.

title: NEC. Stunning Solihull Trendy Penthouse+balc PETS
description:
Stunning private penthouse with lovely Waterside and south facing balcony, located so close to the NEC, BHX Airport, Solihull Hospital and shopping, JLR, Resorts Worlds, Motorcycle Museum and National Trust homes and gardens. Just 2 minutes walk to gastro pubs ,shops and restaurantsl +stunning walks along the beautiful Stratford Upon Avon canal. A quick 20 minute drive or train ride to Central Birmingham. Stratford Upon Avon, Warwick castle and Cadbury World are a short distance. Free WiFi.

The space
An elegant ,contemporary spotlessly clean penthouse apartment ,with large south facing private balcony, free basement parking, and a lift that takes you right to your apartment door. This could possibly be helpful to those who need easy access due to physical impairment.The property has hard floors throughout and no carpets so could be a possible option for those needing to bring a well behaved pet. All rooms are on one level. This property has secure underground parking in the basement with direct access to your apartment door via an elevator.

Guest access
all space. entire private apartment Guests can call us or, text or email for a fast response. Normally always available for advice on location and places to visit etc

Other things to note
2 minutes walk to canalside walks, beautiful scenery and shops and restaurants.
Very easy fast access to Central Birmingham and all West Midlands motorways
Security for your car with underground parking and lift
Pets considered
Penthouse specification
This property can be made available long term and serviced if agreed in advance by hosts

host_about:
Well travelled, having lived in several countries, and vacationed in many  others countries.  
 I lived for 9 years in Hong Kong, Cyprus , Spain, India and the Greek islands and love the colour and contrast of other cultures ,scenery, wildlife, nature and foods. I love to host and meet new people. Love to try food from other countries .
I am a passionate lover of wildlife, nature and conservation and have travelled extensively to see some of the world's finest creatures in their natural environments. Many more destinations in the world yet to experience. The tick list is far from complete as there is so much more to see and do. New continents yet to discover and experiences to have. 
My knowledge of the UK and it's many sights and scenery is extensive, and I am happy to help those who would like to see as much of our beautiful country as possible.

title: Comfortable 3-Bed Home | Free Parking | M6 Access
description:
Welcome to this comfortable 3-bed home with loft room in B42, ideal for contractors, NHS staff, business travellers, families, and longer stays. Easy access to Birmingham city centre and the M6, with free on-site parking. Includes fast WiFi, Smart TV, fully equipped kitchen, and fresh linen. Quiet residential area with shops, local pubs, and transport links nearby—perfect for work stays, relocations, or visiting Birmingham.

The space
🛏️ Bedroom 1: Zip-link super king-size bed (can be arranged as 2 single beds)

🛏️ Bedroom 2: Comfortable double bed

🛏️ Bedroom 3: Zip-link super king-size bed (can be arranged as 2 single beds)

🚗 Free on-site parking available

🍽️ Fully equipped kitchen with essentials, utensils, cookware, and cutlery

🛁 Newly renovated bathroom with basic toiletries provided

🧺 Fresh linen and towels included for all guests

👕 Box room set up as an ironing room with iron and ironing board

💨 Hairdryer provided in each bedroom

📶 Fast WiFi throughout the property

📺 Comfortable living area with Smart TV



📍 Nearby Attractions & Essentials


🛣️ Just 5 minutes from the M6 for easy travel across Birmingham and surrounding areas

🏙️ Around 20 minutes’ drive to Birmingham city centre

🏟️Approximately 5 minutes to the Alexander Stadium

🍺 Local pubs within a short walking distance

🛒 Local shops and supermarkets nearby (around 5 minutes away)

🚌 Convenient public transport links nearby with direct routes into Birmingham city centre

Guest access
Guests will have full, private access to the entire property, ensuring complete privacy throughout your stay. The house benefits from its own private entrance.
Self check-in is available from 4 PM using a secure lockbox, allowing you to arrive at a time that suits you.


📌 Additional Information

🏠 House Guidelines
To help ensure a pleasant stay for everyone, please follow these guidelines:

🎉 No Parties or Events – The property is strictly for booked guests only. Events or gatherings are not permitted.

🚬 No Smoking Indoors – Smoking or vaping is not allowed inside the property.

🐶 No Pets – Pets are not permitted at this property.

🌙 Quiet Hours – Please keep noise to a minimum, particularly during late evening and night hours.

🛠️ Take Care of the Property – Please treat the home with respect and notify us promptly of any issues or damage.

⛔ No Illegal Activity – Any illegal substances or activities are strictly prohibited.

👤 Registered Guests Only – Only guests included in the booking are allowed on the property unless agreed in advance.

🧼 Cleanliness – Please leave the property in a tidy condition. Additional cleaning fees may apply if the property is left excessively untidy.

💳 Security Deposit – A refundable £250 deposit is required before check-in. This will be returned after your stay, provided no damage or extra cleaning is needed.

We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to hosting you!

title: Birmingham City Retreat No 166
description:
Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. This modern 2-bedroom penthouse offers comfort, luxury and convenience in the heart of Birmingham, a short walk from the Bull Ring, Grand Central Station and the city centre. You're here for work or a weekend- you've got everything you need. . Featuring spacious living areas, elegant interiors, a fully equipped kitchen, and impressive city views, it’s perfect for business stays, weekend escapes, couples, families, and city explorers.

The space
Both bedrooms have proper double beds with comfortable bedding — no bunks, no sofa beds, no squeezing. Ideal if you're sharing with a colleague, a partner, or a small group who all want their own space.


There's a main bathroom and an additional ensuite, so four people sharing isn't the juggle.

Flat 166

The living area

The open-plan living space has a dining table and four chairs, a comfortable sofa, and a TV. It's a decent size — enough room to eat together, spread out, or wind down after a long day without everyone being on top of each other.

The kitchen

Fully equipped for cooking proper meals: microwave, fridge/freezer, kettle, filter coffee maker, and all the crockery, glassware, pots and utensils you'd need. You won't need to eat out every night unless you want to.

Working from the flat

There's a dedicated workspace and fast wifi, so if you're in Birmingham on a job and need to get admin done in the evening, you're sorted.

Getting in

Self check-in via a key nest — no need to coordinate with anyone on arrival. Check-in from 3pm, checkout by 10am.

Parking

Grand Central and Birmingham New Street are about a 15-minute walk. The Bull Ring, city centre restaurants, bars and shops are all walkable from the door. If you're heading to Aston Villa Stadium, it's roughly 15-17 minutes by car.

Guest access
You will have full access to flat 166.

Other things to note
This property is located not too far from the Aston Villa stadium and approximatively 15 minutes drive as well as other local landmarks.

description:
Relax in our stylish 3-bedroom home, designed for contractors, families, and business travelers. Enjoy free parking, WiFi, a fully equipped kitchen, and a peaceful private garden. Situated in a quiet area near Birmingham, Dudley Zoo, and major transport links, it’s the perfect place to unwind after a busy day. With self-check-in and a homely feel, you’ll have everything you need for an easy and comfortable stay in the West Midlands.

The space
Enjoy a stylish and spacious 3-bedroom home in Rowley Regis, ideal for families, contractors, and business travelers. Each bedroom includes a Smart TV, providing private entertainment for every guest.

The clean, modern bathroom features both a bath and shower—perfect for relaxing after a long day. The open living room, with a large Smart TV and comfortable seating, is a welcoming space for groups to unwind together.

Prepare meals with ease in the fully equipped kitchen, complete with oven, stovetop, microwave, toaster, fridge, and essential cookware. A washing machine and dryer are also provided for your convenience—great for longer stays or working guests.

Stay connected with fast, reliable WiFi throughout the home. Step into the large private garden, ideal for outdoor dining, fresh air, or simply relaxing in a quiet setting.

Designed with comfort and functionality in mind, this property offers everything you need for a relaxing, productive, and enjoyable stay near Birmingham.

Guest access
Guests have full, exclusive access to the entire property during their stay. This includes:

All three bedrooms

The private bathroom

Fully equipped kitchen

Living room with Smart TV

Laundry facilities (washing machine & dryer)

Large private back garden with outdoor seating

Free off-street parking at the rear of the property

Self-check-in is available via a secure key safe, allowing you to arrive at your convenience.

Other things to note
This is a self-check-in property; detailed instructions will be sent before your arrival.

The home is in a quiet, residential area—please respect our neighbors and observe quiet hours after 10 PM.

A starter pack of essentials (toilet paper, washing up liquid, tea/coffee, etc.) is provided to get you started.

Free off-street parking is available at the rear of the property.

The property is professionally cleaned before each stay.

Long stays are welcome—please message us if you have specific requirements.

No parties or events are allowed.

Serviced room accommodation in Edgbaston B16. The house is located on city rd, just a stone throw away from Rotton Park Rd. The number 80/11 bus stop is opposite, making logistical plans a breeze. 20 minutes from the city centre by bus. Outside the CAZ.
There is a variety of fastfood outlets and convenience stores within a short walking distance. Please ensure you carry out a due diligence search of the location with the above information to ensure a smooth process.

The space
Home from home 147 🏠Experience shared living in this spacious home. A ground floor room with a kingsized bed. Shared facilities include two bathrooms shared with up to five other guest rooms.

The room has a variety of amenities to suit your needs.

Night light

100mb Wifi throughout.

.

The space
Room located in a 3-bedroom flat boasting modern and inviting decor, thoughtfully adorned with carefully selected details to create a homely atmosphere. Furnished with a comfortable single bed, wardrobe, desk, and a cozy office chair for your extended hours, the space is perfect for those seeking a delightful and budget-friendly stay in the city center. Additionally, the room is well soundproof insulated, ensuring a peaceful and quiet environment for your comfort during your delightful and budget-friendly stay in the city center.

You'll enjoy access to a fully equipped kitchen and a meticulously maintained, spotlessly clean shared bathroom. Conveniently located just a 5-min walk to the bus stop, 10-min to Shirley Train Station, and 3-min to local shops. Enjoy nearby canal walks, a peaceful park, and The Colebrook pub. Whether you're working remotely or unwinding, experience the perfect blend of comfort and connectivity.

We’d be honored to host your stay.

The space
“The room available is spacious and comfortable, with access to a private bathroom. As this is our family home, we live upstairs and have our own bathroom. The downstairs bathroom is mainly for guest use, though it may occasionally be used by my children. The room provides a peaceful and relaxing space, suitable for both short and longer stays. Free Wi-Fi and complimentary tea/coffee can be provided for your convenience.

Guest access
Guests will have access to the bedroom, the nearby bathroom, and a parking space at the front of the house. The room is located close to the entrance, making it private and convenient during your stay.

During your stay
My family and I live in the home, so I am usually available if you need any assistance. I’m happy to answer questions or offer recommendations, but will always respect your privacy. The easiest way to reach me is through the Airbnb app or mobile phone.

Other things to note
Guests do not have access to the upstairs, kitchen, or garden.

Visitors are not permitted inside the house without prior approval.

Quiet hours: 9 PM – 7 AM

🚭 No smoking inside the property

Pets not allowed

Please keep the shared areas tidy for everyone’s comfort

Flexible check-in/out available upon request

We kindly ask all guests to respect the house rules and shared spaces so that everyone enjoys a comfortable stay.

title: Your Stylish Home in The Octagon – 1-Bed Apartment
description:
Elevated Urban Living at Birmingham’s Iconic Octagon
Experience refined city living at the brand new 'The Octagon Tower', Birmingham’s tallest and most iconic residential tower. This striking 49-storey landmark rises above the city skyline within the prestigious Paradise development.

Enjoy panoramic city views alongside a calm, modern interior designed for both comfort and style.

The space
Designed for both short and monthly stays, this apartment offers a seamless blend of comfort, convenience, and sophistication. We are more than just an Airbnb—guests benefit from a professionally managed experience, including 24-hour reception check-in and premium on-site services, offering more than simply a place to stay.

🏨 This is not just an Airbnb, we offer the fix of a hotel and a home with a front desk support!

Guest access
24/7 Guest Support 🕒📞🛎️

From booking to check-out, our dedicated team is available around the clock to ensure a smooth and worry-free experience, whether you need assistance, recommendations, or on-site support.

Building Amenities:
🏋️‍♂️ Fully equipped gym
🛋️ Resident lounge
💻Co-working spaces
🛎️Concierge services
✅ 24/7 Reception & On-Site Support
✅ Check-in directly at the building with our fully staffed front desk

Parking Details: 🚗
There is no parking available in the building 🚫. However, there are nearby car parks:

NCP Car Park – Newhall Street, Birmingham B3 1SW
About an 8-minute walk 🚶‍♂️ from the property.

Q-Park – Brindley Place
About a 15-minute walk 🚶‍♀️ from the property.

Both are paid parking, but we will reimburse the cost. Please keep your receipt and send us a photo for reimbursement.

Other things to note
🔔 Important Notes Before Booking:
(Please Read Carefully)

UPON BOOKING:
✔️A valid passport or driver’s licence is required for all guests (hotel-style security requirement).
✔️The name on the ID must match the Airbnb account holder.
✔️Guests must sign our terms and conditions prior to check-in.

A £29 non-refundable damage waiver is required. This replaces a traditional deposit and covers accidental damage during your stay.
Check-In

We operate a meet-and-greet, in-person check-in at the building reception. A member of our team will meet you to hand over the keys.

Complimentary Essentials Pack (On Arrival) 🎁🛏️🧴
To help you settle in comfortably, we provide a complimentary starter essentials pack on arrival.

✨ Please note that there may be slight variations in the colour of the sofa, bedding, and bed frame. The apartment size, layout, and overall quality remain consistent. Some furnishings may vary as part of ongoing upgrades to enhance the guest experience.

Business & Long-Term Stays 💼🏢🛏️
We offer exclusive discounts for business travellers and long-term stays. Please contact us directly for tailored rates and monthly discounts.

title: Skyline views near Moor Street Station
description:
Located in Aston and just minutes from the Bullring Shopping Centre, this modern two-bedroom apartment is a rare find, offering spacious bedrooms, and stunning skyline views of Birmingham.

The space
Perfectly positioned close to Colmore Row, Birmingham’s vibrant business district, and the lively Chinese Quarter, you’ll also find a fantastic selection of Asian restaurants right downstairs. Convenience is at your doorstep with nearby grocery stores including Co-op and Spar.

Ideal for both short and long stays, the apartment is fully equipped for your comfort and convenience. You’ll enjoy a modern kitchen, high-speed Wi-Fi, fresh bed linen and towels, complimentary toiletries, and Netflix on a large 50” Smart TV (logged into a guest account). Tea and coffee are also provided.

We will pay for your parking nearby.

We’re available 24/7 should you need any assistance during your stay.

Guest access
You'll have full, private access to the apartment for the duration of your stay – no shared spaces. Enjoy the freedom to come and go as you please.

Please note that the key collection is from our office, approximately a 8-min drive from the apartment.

Other things to note
I offer a wide range of properties to suit every need, from short getaways to long-term stays and group bookings. With hundreds of options across various locations, I can provide comfort, convenience, and flexibility for any occasion. Don’t hesitate to reach out for more details on long-term and group booking options! No parties and gatherings.

title: Canal-side flat with free parking
description:
Enjoy a bright, stylish 1-bedroom flat with private garden access. Located in a peaceful canal-side building, this home offers modern comfort, a fully equipped kitchen, and cosy living space. Ideal for business or leisure stays, with easy access to central Birmingham and surrounding areas. Book your stay and enjoy the city like a local!

The space
- Central location backing onto the canal
- Super-fast Wi-Fi & dedicated laptop desk
- Fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher & washer
- Single-level access, no stairs
- 24/7 guest support & professional cleaning

Welcome to your light-filled Birmingham retreat—perfect for couples, solo travellers or business guests seeking style and convenience.

Living & Dining:
Relax on the modern sofa with Smart TV and bookshelf selection. A round dining table for two sits by leafy houseplants, creating an inviting spot for meals or emails.

Kitchen:
Sleek shaker-style cabinets hide every appliance you'll need: oven, hob, microwave, fridge-freezer, dishwasher, kettle and toaster. Cooking basics, wine glasses and cleaning products provided.

Bedroom:
Unwind in a plush double bed dressed in hotel-quality linens. Blackout curtains and a quiet outlook promise a great night's sleep. Built-in wardrobe and drawers keep luggage out of sight.

Bathroom:
Freshen up in the subway-tiled bathroom featuring rainfall shower over bathtub, fluffy towels, hair dryer and complimentary toiletries.

Outdoor Space:
Slide the patio door open to a shared lawn that borders the tranquil canal—ideal for morning coffee or sunset strolls.

Location:
Moments from Brindleyplace, arena venues and major road links, yet tucked away in a peaceful residential block. Central Birmingham is 10 minutes by car or 20 minutes on foot.

We'd love to host you—send us a message and secure your dates today!

Guest access
Guests have access to the full property during their stay. Enjoy!
